name: Alpha Wolf Helm
description: A helm crafted from the hide of an alpha wolf. The coarse, uncleaned fur retains the raw scent of the wildlife.

name: Angler's Pack
description: A pack of freshly caught fish, the scales glinting to boast their freshness.

name: Apothecary's Pack
description: A pack neatly organized with various medicinal herbs, with vials and packaging safely stored inside.

name: Apple Pack
description: A pack containing apples. Made of sturdy cloth and a wooden frame, it is a practical choice.

name: Arkhan Leather Helm
description: A leather helm favored by the guards in the desert. The red helm is reminiscent of the desert's blazing sun and sands, and its short brim helps block the desert's harsh sun.

name: Armor of Loyal Friendship
description: An armor crafted with great care by a Delesyian artisan of excellent craftsmanship. It's a gift meant to honor enduring friendship with the land of technology, regardless of origin. Only those who have contributed to Delesyia are permitted to possess it.

name: Ashad Plate Armor
description: A plate armor named after Ashad, an orc wanderer and freesword of the Crimson Desert. The delicate golden patterns etched upon the roughly forged, thick plates prove he was no mere barbarian. Its immense weight provides absolute stability, turning even a foe's mightiest blow into nothing more than a dull thud.

name: Ashad Plate Boots
description: Plate boots named after Ashad, an orc wanderer and freesword of the Crimson Desert. Thick steel wraps tightly around the shins, while golden ornaments shaped like the desert sun protect the knees. Secured firmly with red leather straps, they embody a spirit that refuses to yield, even against the fiercest gust or enemy assault.

name: Ashad Plate Cloak
description: A plate cloak named after Ashad, an orc wanderer and freesword of the Crimson Desert. It features layers of deep blue cloth secured with golden cords. It is designed to cover the mouth and nose, providing protection amidst the sandy winds.

name: Ashad Plate Gloves
description: Plate gloves named after Ashad, an orc wanderer and freesword of the Crimson Desert. Golden plating covers the back of the hand and forearm to protect against cuts and impacts, while the articulated joints ensure the wearer's grip remains fluid and agile.

name: Ashad Plate Helm
description: A plate helm named after Ashad, an orc wanderer and freesword of the Crimson Desert. Its golden horns are reminiscent of a desert cow, while the single-piece faceplate and neck cover protect the wearer from both attacks and sand.

name: Ashclaw Leather Armor
description: Armor worn by members of the Black Bears. While it looks crude and haphazardly made, the craftsmanship is surprisingly high.

name: Ashen Wolf's Leather Armor
description: Fine leather armor crafted for orcs. Thick hide and fur-lined shoulder covers fend off both the midwinter wind and blades, while tightly tied leather straps and a belt keep it from shifting even during intense movement.

name: Ashen Wolf's Leather Boots
description: Fine leather shoes crafted for orcs. The instep is tied securely with leather straps for stable movement, while a cloth wrap extending to the shins keeps out dust and the cold wind.

name: Ashen Wolf's Leather Cloak
description: A fine leather cloak crafted for orcs. Thick fur covers the neck and shoulders to block the cold wind, while the long hem wraps around the back to keep the warmth even while moving.

name: Ashen Wolf's Leather Gloves
description: Fine leather gloves crafted for orcs. Reinforced with thick hide across the back of the hand and wrist to resist chafing and cuts, its long cover that reaches up to the forearm block the cold wind.

name: Ator's Will Cloth Armor
description: Armor worn by warriors who worship the darkness. Only those who prove their superior strength and faith in the Antumbra earn the honor of being called "Ator's Will."

name: Ator's Will Helm
description: A helm worn by warriors who worship the darkness. Only those who prove their superior strength and faith in the Antumbra earn the honor of being called "Ator's Will."

name: Ator's Will Leather Boots
description: Leather boots of warriors who worship the darkness. Those who have proven their power and faith in the Antumbra earn the honor of being called "Ator's Will." With all their might, they pray for Umbra's descent.

name: Ator's Will Leather Gloves
description: Leather gloves of warriors who worship the darkness. Those who have proven their power and faith in the Antumbra earn the honor of being called "Ator's Will." They pray that they too, can become a dark deacon.

name: Autumn Banquet Cloth Cloak
description: A formal cloth cloak that captures the quiet elegance of an autumn forest. Deep-toned fabric falls in long lines to form a neat silhouette, while a subtle sheen adds the autumn mood, like falling leaves.

name: Autumn Banquet Leather Armor
description: A formal leather armor that captures the quiet elegance of an autumn forest. It has delicate patterned detailing and a golden trim layer over dark leather, creating a neat yet vibrant look. The long, split sleeve ends fall softly like autumn leaves with every movement.

name: Autumn Banquet Leather Boots
description: Formal leather boots that capture the quiet elegance of an autumn forest. Dark leather runs smoothly up to the shin for a neat look, with a small buckle as a subtle accent. In the light, it takes on a gentle sheen, completing a composed outfit.

name: Autumn Banquet Leather Gloves
description: Formal leather gloves that capture the quiet elegance of an autumn forest. Made from deep-toned leather, they extend to the wrist and wrap it neatly, finished with fine stitching and clean cut lines. A subtle sheen spreads softly in the light, adding a restrained sense of formality.

name: Autumn Banquet Plate Helm
description: A ceremonial plate helm that captures the quiet elegance of an autumn forest. Delicate patterns are engraved into the thin golden plates encircling the head, leaving a refined impression, while the ornament at the center draws the eye to create a sense of balance. It catches the light with a subtle luster, providing the perfect finishing touch to a dignified attire.

name: Bandit Cloth Armor
description: A cloth armor worn by bandits. They favor it for its lightweight feel, despite its lack of durability.

name: Bandit Cloth Cloak
description: A cloth cloak worn by bandits. They favor it for its lightweight feel, despite its lack of durability.

name: Bear Hide Cloak
description: A cloak crafted in the traditional style of Pailune. It is made from roughly tanned leather and fur that still reeks of bear.

name: Bear Pack
description: A bear-shaped pack with various items neatly organized inside.

name: Bedure Chain Cloak
description: A chain cloak worn by officers of the Wells brigade. The long, deep red fabric establishes a commander's dignity, while the heraldic ornaments on the shoulders display their affiliation and authority. Its heavy hem ensures a neat appearance even during marches and combat.

name: Bedure Chain Mail
description: A chain mail issued only to officers of the Wells brigade. The breastplate and pauldrons are layered over the fine chainmail to increase the commander's survivability, while the red sash signifies their rank.

name: Bedure Plate Helm
description: A plate helm worn by officers of the Wells brigade. The rounded, protruding visor deflects blade tips and arrows, while the smooth, curved plating disperses impact. The gold, red, and black feathers atop the crown serve as a marker to signal the commander's location even from a distance.

name: Beekeeper's Pack
description: A pack containing a beehive and beekeeping tools, holding everything needed to harvest honey.

name: Beekeeping Boots
description: One of the essential items of beekeepers. It is a vital piece of equipment when working with bees to avoid getting stung. They are reinforced with sturdy hide so that a bee's sting cannot pierce through.

name: Beekeeping Cloak
description: A cloak made to protect the body from insect attacks. It feels a bit stifling, but the effect is undeniable. Wearing this allows the wearer to withstand attacks from bees.

name: Beekeeping Gloves
description: One of the essential items of beekeepers. It is a vital piece of equipment when working with bees to avoid getting stung. They are reinforced with sturdy hide so that a bee's sting cannot pierce through.

name: Beekeeping Suit
description: A thick protective suit made for beekeeping. The dense fabric and mesh netting prevent bee stings from penetrating. Wearing this allows the wearer to withstand attacks from bees.

name: Beighen Cloth Cloak
description: A cloth cloak of the Beighen Militia. It is commonly worn by militiamen in Beighen, a small village on the edge of Pailune. It's embroidered with a wood pattern, the village's symbol.

name: Belkandor Plate Armor
description: A plate armor crafted to honor Belkandor, the Silent Shield, who once aided in defending Gorthak. Golden patterns are etched into the black plate to commemorate his deeds. The torso and waist are constructed from multiple overlapping plates, ensuring no gaps open during movement.

name: Belkandor Plate Boots
description: Plate boots crafted to honor Belkandor, who once aided in defending Gorthak. Black plate wraps the shins, while the articulated ankles ensure stability even on slopes and debris. The reinforced toes provide the solid footing needed to hold the line when pushing a shield wall forward.

name: Belkandor Plate Cloak
description: A plate cloak crafted to honor Belkandor, who once aided in defending Gorthak. The blackened cloak and plate armor dampen light to conceal the wearer's presence, while the eagle-shaped pauldron ornaments serve as a crest in honor of Belkandor.

name: Belkandor Plate Gloves
description: Plate gloves crafted to honor Belkandor, who once aided in defending Gorthak. Black plates are adorned with gold patterns, featuring internal leather padding to protect the hands from chafing. Each finger joint is articulated, ensuring the hands remain nimble while wielding a sword and shield.

name: Belkandor Plate Helm
description: A plate helm crafted to honor Belkandor, who once aided in defending Gorthak. A black iron headgear framed with a golden trim, featuring winged ornaments at the temples that bear the marks of an eagle.

name: Bell Pack
description: A pack containing bells of various sizes, which makes a pleasant sound.

name: Beltran Plate Helm
description: A practical plate helm widely used among wandering freeswords. Its simple plate structure is easy to maintain, and the replaceable leather straps allow for quick repairs at camp, ensuring long-term use. The open design provides a clear field of vision and easy breathing, making it particularly well-suited for chaotic brawls and ambushes.

name: Bespoke Visione
description: A visione for those who want to stand out. Its performance is identical to other models. A mysterious helm that can read memory fragments, allowing the wearer to see a memory from the past.

name: Birdcage Pack
description: A pack containing a small birdcage and related goods, allowing birds to be transported safely.

name: Black Bear Gas Mask
description: A special breathing apparatus crafted by the Black Bears. While it looks crude and haphazardly made, the craftsmanship is surprisingly high.

name: Black Bears' Cloth Cloak
description: A cloak worn by members of the Black Bears. While it looks crude and haphazardly made, the craftsmanship is surprisingly high.

name: Black Bears' Leather Helm
description: A helm worn by members of the Black Bears. While it looks crude and haphazardly made, the craftsmanship is surprisingly high.

name: Blackwing Leather Armor
description: A leather armor once worn by the Crowcaller. The leather, hardened through unknown sorcery, is as tough as metal, and an ominous malice and magical power radiate from deep within the armor. After meeting his mother, he accepted wicked power and became a warrior of darkness.

name: Blackwing Leather Boots
description: Leather boots once worn by the Crowcaller. Crafted from soft yet durable leather, they gently wrap around the wearer's feet, helping them move with agility across any terrain. The crow's claw on the instep leaves an unsettling impression on anyone who sees it.

name: Blackwing Leather Cloak
description: A leather cloak once worn by the Crowcaller. In some regions of Pywel, crows are often associated with dark magic or sorcery. The pure malice felt from the cloak makes it hard to ignore such superstitions.

name: Blackwing Leather Gloves
description: Leather gloves once worn by the Crowcaller. They are so tough that it's hard to believe they're made of leather. They seem to have undergone some kind of treatment. In some regions of Pywel, crows are often associated with dark magic or sorcery. The pure malice felt from the gloves makes it hard to ignore such superstitions.

name: Blackwing Mask
description: A plate mask once worn by the Crowcaller. Numerous feathers are planted upon this crow-shaped visage. Donning it almost makes it feel as if it whispers to you.

name: Bleed Bandits' Alchemy Explosive Pack
description: A pack containing a bundle of alchemical bombs, crafted by one of the rare few intelligent members within the Bleed Bandits. Impacts during combat may occasionally cause these alchemy bombs to drop. Exercise extreme caution, as the explosives do not distinguish between ally and enemy.

name: Blinding Arrow Cloth Cloak
description: A cloak worn by members of the Blinding Arrows. They present themselves as a militia, but the materials used to craft this gear were plundered from innocent civilians.

name: Blinding Arrow's Leather Armor
description: Armor that is completely broken and can no longer serve its function. Though it cannot be equipped, it can be sold at a shop or donated to the camp.

name: Blinding Arrow's Mask
description: A helm worn by members of the Blinding Arrows. They present themselves as a militia, but the materials used to craft this gear were plundered from innocent civilians.

name: Blue Scout Armor
description: Armor for scouts who gather news from across Pywel faster than anyone. A small token of support for their endless journey, made to guard those setting out on great adventures.

name: Blue Scout Cloak
description: A cloak for scouts who gather news from across Pywel faster than anyone. A small token of support for their endless journey, meant to flutter behind those who lead the way.

name: Blue Scout Hat
description: A headgear for scouts who gather news from across Pywel faster than anyone. Designed to accentuate their features, this piece carries a heartfelt wish for their endless journey.

name: Boar Cloak
description: A cloak crafted from boar hide. Though somewhat heavy and cumbersome, it faithfully mimics the appearance of a boar. Equipping this makes it harder for boars to detect the wearer.

name: Bollin Leather Boots
description: Leather boots commonly worn by the people of Demeniss. So ordinary that they blend into the cityscape, barely drawing a second glance.

name: Bollin Leather Gloves
description: Sturdy leather gloves. Affordable yet high-quality, they are used not only in combat but also in many jobs that require decent handiwork.

name: Bolton Leather Boots
description: Ceremonial leather shoes crafted by the artisans of Hernand. These boots are made from soft yet durable dark brown leather. Delicate patterns adorn the upper part of the boots, offering a blend of elegance and practical utility.

name: Bolton Plate Armor
description: A ceremonial plate armor crafted by the master artisans of Hernand. It boasts both elegance and practical functionality. Only those who have contributed to Hernand are permitted to possess it.

name: Bolton Plate Cloak
description: A ceremonial cloak crafted by the master artisans of Hernand. It boasts both elegance and practical functionality. Only those who have contributed to Hernand are permitted to possess it.

name: Bolton Plate Helm
description: A ceremonial plate helm crafted by the master artisans of Hernand. It boasts both elegance and practical functionality. Only those who have contributed to Hernand are permitted to possess it.

name: Boren Leather Helm
description: A funny-looking helmet made from an entire leather shoe worn over the head.

name: Boss Bear Hat
description: A hat crafted from the hide of an alpha bear. It is made from roughly tanned leather and fur that still reeks of the beast.

name: Brass Warden's Plate Gloves
description: Plate gloves once worn by a nameless soldier who spent years drifting from one battlefield to the next. Multiple leather straps are wound tightly over the plates covering the back of the hand, while the worn and scratched surface bears the marks of brutal combat. This equipment prioritizes defense over any sense of flair.

name: Brimstone Gas Mask
description: Crude protective gear crafted from canvas soaked in a special neutralizer and fitted with airtight goggles. It perfectly filters out dense brimstone fumes and volcanic ash. This equipment ensures safe breathing and clear vision even in active volcanoes thick with the smoke of death, or in highly toxic wetlands.

name: Broken Visione
description: Broken Visione: Missing Cows

name: Camouflage Outfit
description: Common clothing that blends into the environment. It is an utterly ordinary piece of equipment that can be found in any city alleyway across Pywel.

name: Canta Plate Armor
description: A plate armor named after Canta, the Wandering Knight. He brought order to barren lands with words, not the sword. Small heroes who wanted nothing more than simple peace made Hernand what it is today.

name: Canta Plate Boots
description: Plate boots named after Canta, the Wandering Knight. He brought order to barren lands with words, not the sword. Hernand was built by humble heroes dreaming of a better life.

name: Canta Plate Cloak
description: A plate cloak named after Canta, the Wandering Knight. He brought order to barren lands with words, not the sword. It embodies the glory of Hernand, which was established by humble heroes.

name: Canta Plate Gloves
description: Plate gloves named after Canta, the Wandering Knight. He brought order to barren lands with words, not the sword. They silently fulfill their role, much like the humble heroes who established Hernand.

name: Canta Plate Helm
description: A plate helm named after Canta, the Wandering Knight. He brought order to the barren lands with words, not the sword. It's calm and unadorned, much like the humble heroes who established Hernand.

name: Carpenter's Pack
description: A pack filled with small furniture components, convenient to use even while on the move.

name: Carta Leather Gloves
description: Leather gloves crafted by Carta, the scrap merchant of Delesyia. Had he received an education or a chance to realize his talent, Delesyia would have had four great engineers, not three.

name: Carta Plate Armor
description: A plate armor crafted by Carta, the scrap merchant of Delesyia. Had he received an education or a chance to realize his talent, he would never have ended up making this armor.

name: Carta Plate Boots
description: Plate boots crafted by Carta, the scrap merchant of Delesyia. Had he received an education or a chance to realize his talent, Delesyia's future might have been the present.

name: Carta Plate Helm
description: A plate helm crafted by Carta, the scrap merchant of Delesyia. Had he received an education or a chance to realize his talent, he would have devoted himself to academia instead of wandering the wastes.

name: Catfish Plate Helm
description: A pirate's plate helm modeled after the head of a giant catfish. Its shimmering eyes and fin ornaments symbolize the ocean predator that never lets go of its bite.

name: Chelcia Plate Armor
description: An armor named after Chelcia, the Lion Knight. Under the royal banner of Thorel, she fought bravely against injustice and still lives on in the hearts of Demenissians. Only those who have greatly contributed to Demeniss are permitted to possess it.

name: Chelcia Plate Boots
description: Plate boots named after Chelcia, the Lion Knight. In the name of the Thorel royal family, her righteous spirit, fighting against injustice with a lion's courage, still lives on somewhere in the hearts of the people of Demeniss.

name: Chelcia Plate Cloak
description: A cloak named after Chelcia, the Lion Knight. Under the royal banner of Thorel, she fought bravely against injustice and still lives on in the hearts of Demenissians. Only those who have greatly contributed to Demeniss are permitted to possess it.

name: Chelcia Plate Helm
description: A helm named after Chelcia, the Lion Knight. Under the royal banner of Thorel, she fought bravely against injustice and still lives on in the hearts of Demenissians. Only those who have greatly contributed to Demeniss are permitted to possess it.

name: Circuit Hijacking Helm
description: A helm designed to detect and interfere with the flow of machinery. By unleashing subtle magnetic pulses, it disrupts the internal circuits of mechanical enemies and impairs their judgment.

name: Cloak of Loyal Friendship
description: A cloak crafted with great care by a Delesyian artisan of excellent craftsmanship. It's a gift meant to honor enduring friendship with the land of technology, regardless of origin. Only those who have contributed to Delesyia are permitted to possess it.

name: Combat God's Plate Gloves
description: An ancient equipment woven tightly with unique fibers and metals. It converts the friction generated upon impact into destructive electrical currents. Charges accumulate rapidly during relentless barrages of strikes, ultimately unleashing power akin to a massive lightning bolt.

name: Condemner's Plate Armor
description: Armor worn by the Righteous Inquisitors. Issued to elite soldiers who revere the power and ideals of Bastier.

name: Condemner's Plate Cloak
description: A cloak worn by the Righteous Inquisitors. Issued to elite soldiers who revere the power and ideals of Bastier.

name: Condemner's Plate Helm
description: A helm worn by Bastier's Inquisitors. Issued to elite soldiers who revere the power and ideals of Bastier.

name: Constellation Helm
description: A helm crafted at the Scholastone to research constellations. It allows the wearer to observe the beautiful stars that adorn the night sky. The deeper the darkness and the clearer the sky, the easier it is to find traces of starlight; in open areas with minimal light, one can just barely discern the outlines of hidden constellations.

name: Coral Mushroom Pack
description: A pack containing coral mushrooms. Made of sturdy cloth and a wooden frame, it is a practical choice.

name: Cotton Pack
description: A pack containing cotton. Made of sturdy cloth and a wooden frame, it is a practical choice.

name: Counterweight Leather Gloves
description: Gloves that combine metal and leather. The plate on the forearm balances the weight to suppress recoil, while the leather on the hand allows for precise controls. This structural harmony pushes precision of the wearer's strikes to the limit, giving them a higher chance to critically hit their target.

name: Cow Cloak
description: A cloak crafted from a single piece of cowhide. Its thick, durable build provides excellent insulation and increases Frost Resistance when equipped.

name: Crimson Chaser Chain Cloak
description: A chain cloak once worn by a former Greymane, Regina, the Crimson Warden. Golden patterns are intricately embroidered over the crimson cloth to add an air of majesty, while short layers cover the shoulders to ensure the movement of the arms and neck remains unobstructed.

name: Crimson Chaser Chain Gloves
description: Chain gloves once worn by a former Greymane, Regina, the Crimson Warden. Metal plates are layered over thick leather gloves to absorb impact while allowing for fluid movement. Daggers can be equipped inside the plates, allowing them to be withdrawn and wielded instantly when needed.

name: Crimson Chaser Mail
description: A chain mail once worn by a former Greymane, Regina, the Crimson Warden. Crimson leather breastplates and pauldrons are layered over golden chains to protect vital points. The armor is split below the belt to ensure unhindered movement while running.

name: Crimson Chaser Plate Helm
description: A plate helm once worn by a former Greymane, Regina, who later became the Crimson Warden. The patterns engraved upon the golden plate glint in the light, while its deep-set design keeps the wearer's gaze hidden. When the slaughter begins and bloodshed sweeps in, the crimson feather rising from the crown sways softly.

name: Crude Devil Mask
description: A rough, circular mask engraved with geometric patterns. It mimics the Reed Devil's, though the craftsmanship is far cruder. Hidden inside is a lethal poison gas mechanism—a sinister piece of equipment designed to inflict unexpected agony on foes who dare approach.

name: Dallaban Leather Gloves
description: Combat leather gloves favored by the Dewhaven soldiers. Dark olive leather wraps tightly from wrist to forearm, providing protection. The durable leather retains its shape even after prolonged battles and offers a secure fit.

name: Dancing Catfish Cloth Armor
description: Armor worn by members of the Dancing Catfish Pirates. The stench of the low-quality booze favored by these pirates cannot be washed away, no matter how many times it is scrubbed.

name: Dark Marksman's Plate Armor
description: A plate armor once worn by Samara, the Sandwatcher. In the desert, tales are told of a dark marksman who appears in the sandstorm, shoots with perfect accuracy, and vanishes. Some outlaws who are inspired by the Dark Marksman dress in a similar way.

name: Dark Marksman's Plate Boots
description: Plate boots once worn by Samara, the Sandwatcher. The black plate extends up to the shins, shielding the wearer from sand and debris. The reinforced toes provide a solid foundation, ensuring one's balance remains steady in a shooting stance.

name: Dark Marksman's Plate Cloak
description: A plate cloak once worn by Samara, the Sandwatcher. The fabric is heavily permeated with the stench of gunpowder. It is dyed with a pitch black color, making it impossible to tell if it is actually stained with gunpowder.

name: Dark Marksman's Plate Gloves
description: Plate gloves once worn by Samara, the Sandwatcher. Pitch-black plate covers the back of the hand and wrist, secured by layers of leather straps and buckles to maintain its shape even against violent recoil. The scars and faint soot remaining on the metal surface are a grim reminder of the gunpowder.

name: Dark Ringleader's Cloth Armor
description: A cloth armor once worn by Walter Lanford, leader of the Bleed Bandits. Lavishly made with fine fabric, gold, and all manner of jewels. Light and soft, it allows for free movement even in combat.

name: Dark Ringleader's Cloth Cloak
description: A cloth cloak once worn by Walter Lanford, leader of the Bleed Bandits. Made from a material that doesn't catch fire easily to suit Lanford's fondness for guns, it also features practical storage for gunpowder, bullets, and more.

name: Dark Ringleader's Cloth Helm
description: A cloth helm once worn by Walter Lanford, leader of the Bleed Bandits. Its vivid colors and feather trim reflect his arrogance. Whether it's practical in combat is another matter.

name: Dark Ringleader's Leather Gloves
description: Leather gloves once worn by Walter Lanford, leader of the Bleed Bandits. It is made from the rare hide of a red river hog. Ornate gold trim set against vivid red leather lends them a refined finish.

name: Deceiver's Fedora
description: A worn felt hat favored by a legendary gambler. The golden monocle attached to the brim is imbued with a secret magic that allows the wearer to see through the surface of things.

name: Deer Hat
description: A helm crafted from the hide of a deer. While heavy and cumbersome due to the scent-heavy leather, it makes the wearer look exactly like a deer.

name: Deer Pack
description: Adorned with branches and leaves, this nature-inspired pack holds tools and resources gathered in the forest. Its lightweight, balanced design ensures easy carrying.

name: Delegation Leather Hat
description: A leather hat worn by delegations for both travel and ceremony. Made from sturdy hide with gold decorations for a formal look, its wide brim shields against sun and rain, making it useful on long journeys. It's dust-resistant and easy to care for.

name: Delesyian Cloth Attire
description: A fancy attire favored by the Delesyians. They enjoy bright and festive clothes, showing their happiness of being free from labor.

name: Delesyian Cloth Cloak
description: A fancy cloak favored by the Delesyians. They enjoy bright and festive clothes, showing their happiness of being free from labor.

name: Delesyian Crown
description: A crown meticulously crafted by the artisans of Delesyia. Adorned with gold and jewels, it was traditionally worn during formal ceremonial events. Only those who have greatly contributed to Delesyia are permitted to possess it.

name: Delesyian Noble's Cloak
description: A cloak crafted with the utmost care by a Delesyian artisan. It carries heartfelt thanks to those striving for a more advanced tomorrow. Only those who have contributed to Delesyia are permitted to possess it.

name: Demeniss Ceremonial Cloak
description: A cloak crafted for commanders who operate independently. It features a unique design for enhanced practicality. While unavailable to outsiders, those who have contributed to Demeniss may be granted the chance to obtain it.

name: Demeniss Ceremonial Plate Armor
description: A plate armor crafted for high-ranking Demenissian commanders. It features a unique design for enhanced practicality. While unavailable to outsiders, those who have contributed to Demeniss may be granted the chance to obtain it.

name: Demeniss Ceremonial Plate Helm
description: A plate helm crafted for high-ranking Demenissian commanders. It features a unique design for enhanced practicality. While unavailable to outsiders, those who have contributed to Demeniss may be granted the chance to obtain it.

name: Demeniss Elite Uniform Leather Boots
description: Leather boots awarded to those who have mastered etiquette in Demeniss. It symbolizes the pride of the noble Demenissian Army.

name: Demeniss Honor Armor
description: Ceremonial armor issued to Demenissian soldiers. It is awarded to those who have distinguished themselves in battle or brought honor to the name of Demeniss. While unavailable to outsiders, those who have contributed to Demeniss may be granted the chance to obtain it.

name: Demenissian Crown
description: A crown meticulously crafted by the artisans of Demeniss. Adorned with gold and jewels, it was traditionally worn during formal ceremonial events. Only those who have greatly contributed to Demeniss are permitted to possess it.

name: Demenissian Elite Plate Gloves
description: Plate gloves issued to high-ranking Demenissian soldiers. The plating covering the back of the hand and the vambrace protecting the wrist are forged as a single piece to deflect sword strikes and shield the forearm. Lined with leather gloves, they prevent the hands from chafing even when gripping weapons for extended periods.

name: Demenissian Elite Uniform Leather Armor
description: A leather armor awarded to those who have mastered the martial arts in Demeniss. It symbolizes the pride of the noble Demenissian Army.

name: Demenissian Noble's Cloak
description: A cloak crafted with the utmost care by a Demenissian artisan. It features delicate embroidery on soft velvet. Only those who have greatly contributed to Demeniss are permitted to possess it.

name: Demenissian Plate Boots
description: Plate boots issued to Demenissian soldiers. The wide greaves and the plating over the instep are joined together, protecting against stones and blades during long marches. Its simple design allows for easy repair and replacement, making it ideal for large-scale supply.

name: Demenissian Soldier Plate Helm
description: A plate helm issued to the Demenissian soldiers. Many consider Demeniss the most powerful nation in Pywel, a reputation owed in no small part to its formidable military forces.

name: Demenissian Soldiers' Brimstone Gas Mask
description: A specialized breathing apparatus used by Demenissian soldiers. Its neatly tailored appearance reflects their strict discipline.

name: Demenissian Uniform Leather Armor
description: Leather armor set popular among Demenissian soldiers. Its neatly tailored appearance reflects their strict discipline.

name: Demenissian Uniform Leather Boots
description: Leather boots popular among Demenissian soldiers. The neatly tailored appearance reflect their strict discipline.

name: Demenissian Uniform Leather Cloak
description: A Leather cloak popular among Demenissian soldiers. Its neatly tailored appearance reflects their strict discipline.

name: Demenissian Uniform Leather Gloves
description: Leather gloves popular among Demenissian soldiers. The neatly tailored appearance reflect their strict discipline.

name: Dendrobium Orchid Pack
description: A pack containing Dendrobium Orchid. Made of sturdy cloth and a wooden frame, it is a practical choice.

name: Desert Marauder's Cloak
description: A cloak worn by the Helms. It is still stained with the blood of their victims and the desert sand.

name: Desert Marauder's Plate Armor
description: Armor that is completely broken and can no longer serve its function. Though it cannot be equipped, it can be sold at a shop or donated to the camp.

name: Desert Marauder's Plate Helm
description: A helm worn by the Helms. It is still stained with the blood of their victims and the desert sand

name: Desert Pack
description: A pack organized with various metal pieces and components, constructed with a sturdy structure.

name: Dewhaven Standard Cloth Cloak
description: A cloth cloak issued to Dewhaven recruits. Despite its lightweight appearance, its durability is guaranteed.

name: Dewhaven Standard Leather Armor
description: Leather armor issued to Dewhaven recruits. Despite its lightweight appearance, its durability is guaranteed.

name: Dewhaven Standard Plate Helm
description: A plate helm issued to Dewhaven recruits. Despite its lightweight appearance, its durability is guaranteed.

name: Disguise Cloak
description: A common cloak that blends into the environment. It is an utterly ordinary piece of equipment that can be found in any city alleyway across Pywel.

name: Disruptor
description: A pack equipped with a device capable of emitting electromagnetic pulses. By releasing a powerful burst, it shocks nearby machines, causing them to malfunction and suffer significant damage.

name: Dragon Flame Armor
description: An armor for Urdavah's dragon knights. Stationed between Tommaso and Varnia, they continue to protect the desert's pilgrims to this day. Only those who have contributed to Tashkalp are permitted to possess it.

name: Dragon Flame Cloak
description: A cloak for Urdavah's dragon knights. Stationed between Tommaso and Varnia, they continue to protect the desert's pilgrims to this day. Only those who have contributed to Tashkalp are permitted to possess it.

name: Dragon Flame Helm
description: A helm for Urdavah's dragon knights. Stationed between Tommaso and Varnia, they continue to protect the desert's pilgrims to this day. Only those who have contributed to Tashkalp are permitted to possess it.

name: Drish Cloth Cap
description: A lightweight, breathable brimmed hat made of cloth. It wards off rain and dust but offers minimal protection.

name: Dulone Plate Boots
description: Plate boots crafted in Urdavah. The lustrous silver plating and elegant golden insignia make these highly popular among royal guards and guard captains. They are worn by fastening them over the footwear and trousers.

name: Dulone Plate Gloves
description: Plate gloves crafted in Urdavah. Their comfortable fit and the luxurious sheen of their brass finish make these highly popular among royal guards and guard captains. Being lighter than other plate gloves, they are widely used in regions where combat is infrequent.

name: Duskfang Leather Armor
description: A leather armor once worn by Hemon Beindel, captain of the Hellhounds. It is crafted from the leather of a hound known for its relentless pursuit and agile movements. The tough leather wraps flexibly around the body, allowing the wearer to move quickly.

name: Duskfang Leather Cloak
description: A leather cloak once worn by Hemon Beindel, leader of the Hellhounds. Made from a whole hellhound hide, the sharp fangs and glaring eyes on the hood give it an intimidating presence.

name: Duskfang Leather Gloves
description: Leather gloves once worn by Hemon Beindel, leader of the Hellhounds. They allow the hands to move freely within the flexible leather, while metal guards from the wrist to the forearm protect against enemy blows.

name: Dutrat Leather Boots
description: Leather boots crafted from light tan leather. The natural texture of the leather surface and the subtle color gradation give off a luxurious feel. For this reason, they are favored by many people.

name: Eastern Monk Pack
description: A simple bag carried by an ascetic from the East. Though worn, it is wrapped in neat cloth and holds the necessities for a life of discipline.

name: Eclipsed Solas Plate Gloves
description: Plate gloves crafted by the orcs of Gorthak. These were dyed with a deep dark color, as if darkness has settled upon them. While the overall design remains similar, the studs on the fists have been modified to enhance the destructive power of unarmed combat.

name: Elegant Carmine Leather Armor
description: A formal leather armor designed to maintain elegance even in the most prestigious places. Gold ornaments and deep crimson lines overlap against black fabric to create a striking contrast, while the waist belt ensures a sharp, refined silhouette. Metal reinforcement at the shoulders and added leather padding protect vital points without slowing down movement.

name: Elegant Carmine Leather Cloak
description: A formal leather cloak designed to maintain elegance even in the most prestigious places. Its deep red hem flows gracefully, leaving an elegant trail with every step, while the structured shoulders ensure it retains its shape perfectly. The leather's natural firmness stands up well to wind and wear, balancing looks and practicality.

name: Elegant Carmine Plate Boots
description: Formal plate boots designed to maintain elegance even in the most prestigious places. Long golden lines are lifted across the black plate to elegantly define the contours of the legs, while rounded ornaments encircling the knees draw the eye. Their presence is felt even with the smallest step, making them suitable for both the banquet feast and the battlefield.

name: Elegant Carmine Plate Gloves
description: Formal plate gloves designed to maintain elegance even in the most prestigious places. Golden trim lines the black plate, accented by deep crimson streaks to create a refined contrast. The leather belt wraps down the left arm, swaying gently with every step to leave a lasting impression unique to formal attire.

name: Elegant Carmine Plate Helm
description: A formal plate headgear designed to maintain elegance even in the most prestigious places. Designed with golden feather ornaments that lightly frame the sides of the head, it ensures an unobstructed field of vision while clearly signifying the wearer's high status.

name: Empty Pack
description: An empty pack that hasn't been filled with any goods. Crafted from light cloth and hide, it's suitable for a variety of uses.

name: Executioner of Darkness Plate Boots
description: Plate boots awarded to those granted a title by House Thorel, the rulers of the Kingdom of Demeniss. Golden plates are set vertically over a dark brown base to create a sharp, sleek silhouette, while the thin plating on the instep flexes naturally with every step.

name: Executioner of Darkness Plate Cloak
description: A plate cloak awarded to those granted a title by the House Thorel, rulers of the Kingdom of Demeniss. Golden patterns are pressed into the black fabric, and the royal crest is prominently displayed on the back to provide immediate proof of one's status.

name: Executioner of Darkness Plate Gloves
description: Plate gloves awarded to those granted a title by House Thorel, the rulers of the Kingdom of Demeniss. Long plates of golden metal are layered over dark brown leather to protect the arms, while the angular ornaments on the back of the hands leave a sharp impression. The interior is smoothly finished, making them well-suited for handling both a sword and paper.

name: Executioner of Darkness Plate Helm
description: A plate helm awarded to those granted a title by House Thorel, the rulers of the Kingdom of Demeniss. Adorned with a golden laurel and winged feathers, it marks the wearer as an enforcer sanctioned by the royal family.

name: Farmer's Pack
description: A sturdy cloth-and-hide pack filled with fresh vegetables and grains. Farming tools can be hung from it, making it ideal for daily farm work and carrying a bountiful harvest.

name: Ferman Leather Boots
description: Leather boots named after the last knight of Delesyia. Ironically, they are often used by pirates, bandits, and wandering freeswords. The people of Delesyia wondered if the age of machines surpassing men had arrived, and chose the old knight Ferman as their champion to face them.

name: Ferman Plate Armor
description: A plate armor named after the last knight of Delesyia. The people of Delesyia wondered if the age had come when machines surpassed mankind. Though none know what drove him, Ferman eventually rose to challenge the Machina Knight.

name: Ferman Plate Cloak
description: A plate cloak named after the last knight of Delesyia. When Ferman's cloak was caught and his spear broke against the Machina Knight, the people believed the age of men at war was ending.

name: Ferman Plate Gloves
description: Plate gloves named after the last knight of Delesyia. The people of Delesyia wondered if the age of machines surpassing men had arrived. Ferman and the Machina Knight fought as equals, and none could easily predict the victor.

name: Ferman Plate Helm
description: A plate helm named after the last knight of Delesyia. The people of Delesyia wondered if the age of machines surpassing men had arrived. However, Ferman refused to duel an opponent without a beating heart.

name: Field Pack
description: A pack containing the items needed for camping and overnight stays. A tent, provisions, and simple cooking tools are wrapped in sturdy hide and cloth.

name: Fire Walk Boots
description: Footwear equipped with a compact flamespitter developed by Faust. Perform consecutive evades to set the ground on fire.

name: Florindale Empty Pack
description: An empty pack that hasn't been filled with any goods. Usually carried by villagers of Florindale.

name: Florindale Flower Bomb Pack
description: Shai-made pack that is shaped like a jar. While it looks like an ordinary jar, it is a dangerous object designed to fire explosive flowers at any moment.

name: Fluttering Radiance Plate Boots
description: Plate boots crafted by engraving a pattern onto pure white plate boots to enhance their elegance. It may go unnoticed at first glance, but the unique pattern reveals itself under the light, adding a touch of sophistication.

name: Fluttering Radiance Plate Gloves
description: Plate gloves crafted in the same design as the popular Fluttering Radiance Plate Boots. A unique pattern is engraved across the entire plate, emphasizing its luxurious quality.

name: Frostcursed Plate Armor
description: A plate armor once worn by Skull Knight the Frostwarden. Grotesquely intertwined rib-like ornaments exude an intimidating aura, as if wearing death itself. A cursed, eternal frost constantly emanates from deep within the armor. Increases the wearer's Frost Resistance.

name: Frostcursed Plate Boots
description: Plate boots once worn by Skull Knight the Frostwarden. Ice crack patterns wrap around the ankles of the blackened plate, and the toes are honed to a bone-like sharpness. A faint, freezing aura emanates with every step.

name: Frostcursed Plate Cloak
description: A plate cloak once worn by Skull Knight the Frostwarden. The sharp seams of the layered pauldrons deflect any blade that strikes them, while the black cloak that's been frozen stiff offers protection as formidable as the armor itself.

name: Frostcursed Plate Gloves
description: Plate gloves worn by Skull Knight the Frostwarden. Black plates covering the back of the hand and long vambraces wrap firmly around the arms, their angular seams overlapping to an edge with every clench of the fists. A thin layer of frost clings to the surface, emitting a chilling aura at the slightest touch.

name: Frostcursed Plate Helm
description: A plate headgear once worn by Skull Knight the Frostwarden. It features crown-like spikes and a black visor that seems to swallow the wearer's face. The chain ornaments hanging from the sides emit a cold metallic ring with every movement, and a chilling frost seeps through the gaps of the helm.

name: Frozen Heart Plate Armor
description: A silver plate armor modeled after the Machina Knight, crafted with inspiration from the Machina Knight's strong appearance. The cold, gleaming metal surface reveals the wearer's dignity and ruthlessness. Its unwavering defense allows the wearer to focus on attacking.

name: Frozen Heart Plate Boots
description: Silver plate boots modeled after the Machina Knight. The cold, shimmering metal extends smoothly to the shins, providing stable support for the lower body. The joints, which flex naturally even during sudden movements, are particularly impressive.

name: Frozen Heart Plate Cloak
description: A silver plate cloak modeled after the Machina Knight. The solid silver pauldrons safely protect the wearer's upper body. The red decorations on the inside create a contrast with the silver exterior.

name: Frozen Heart Plate Gloves
description: Silver plate gloves modeled after the Machina Knight. The cold, shimmering metal firmly wraps around the back of the hand and wrist to deflect impact, while the smooth surface reveals mechanical precision. Red accents on the interior contrast with the silver, further heightening its cold impression.

name: Gael Cloth Armor
description: A cloth armor of a Delesyian guard. A harmonious blend of vivid green and warm gold. It is said that some mockingly remarked that Delesyian soldiers would wear their banquet attire even onto the battlefield.

name: Gearmelt Confectionery Pack
description: A pack that automatically manufactures cacao snacks. A portable factory concentrating the technological prowess of the Gearmelt Confectionery association, it continuously produces snacks at regular intervals.

name: Giant's Boots
description: Footwear crafted from a severed piece of the Sacred Tree. Landing from a certain height generates a shockwave to attack.

name: Goblin Pumpkin Helm
description: A ridiculous helm carved from a whole, fully ripe pumpkin. Eye holes have been cut to see through, and the thick rind helps block minor knocks and dust. It is perfect for festivals or playful disguises.

name: Goldbranch Plate Crown
description: A crown shaped like spreading branches. Since ancient times, crowns have symbolized the status of those in power. However, wearing a crown does not mean one possesses the leadership to match it.

name: Golden Free Company's Plate Armor
description: Armor worn by members of the Twilight Messengers. The contrast between its ornate appearance and the lingering scent of blood is deeply unsettling.

name: Golden Free Company's Plate Helm
description: A helm worn by members of the Twilight Messengers. The contrast between its ornate appearance and the lingering scent of blood is deeply unsettling.

name: Golden Greed Plate Armor
description: A plate armor once worn by Merrick, the Knight of Fortune. Crafted from brilliant golden metal, the intricate plates encase the entire body, radiating a magnificent glow when caught by the light. The golden chain exudes both opulence and majesty.

name: Golden Greed Plate Boots
description: Plate boots once worn by Merrick, the Knight of Fortune. Golden metal wraps around the shins and insteps, casting a blinding glare when caught in the sunlight. However, the uneven thickness of the plates and the crude finish suggest a vulnerability to impact, revealing that practicality was somewhat sacrificed for the sake of glamor.

name: Golden Greed Plate Cloak
description: A plate cloak once worn by Merrick, the Knight of Fortune. It features pauldrons forged from golden metal and fabric that shimmers with a brilliant gold hue when caught in the sunlight.

name: Golden Greed Plate Gloves
description: Plate Gloves once used by Merrick, the Knight of Fortune. While they retain the golden luster, some criticize that they are unsuitable for combat, likely due to being mixed with cheap iron. However, everyone acknowledges their beauty as they glisten in the sunlight.

name: Golden Greed Plate Helm
description: A plate helm once worn by Merrick, the Knight of Fortune. Crafted from radiant golden metal, it fully encases the head and face, casting an exaggerated, brilliant glare when caught in the light. While it appears majestic at a glance, a closer inspection reveals coarse finishing and overly soft metal, exposing it as equipment designed more for vanity than protection.

name: Goldlight Plate Boots
description: Plate boots crafted to commemorate the construction of the Gate of Peace. These boots serve as a symbol of peace and prosperity. Polished golden plate covers the instep and calf, featuring an engraved pattern that subtly reveals itself when caught by the light.

name: Goldlight Plate Cloak
description: A plate cloak crafted to commemorate the construction of the Gate of Peace. This cloak serves as a symbol of peace and prosperity. The angelic figures carved into the pauldrons depict protection, while the vivid red pattern stands out boldly across the back. Its radiant appearance commands attention even on the battlefield.

name: Goldlight Plate Gloves
description: Plate gloves crafted to commemorate the construction of the Gate of Peace. These gloves serve as a symbol of peace and prosperity. Red trim accents the golden plate for the signature coloring, and the wide design cover the entire wrist. They are also often used as ceremonial equipment.

name: Goldlight Plate Helm
description: A plate helm crafted to commemorate the construction of the Gate of Peace. A lush red plume rises from the golden headgear, making it stand out even from a distance. The visor conceals the wearer's expression to add a sense of gravity. It exudes a refined authority, whether on the battlefield or in a procession.

name: Grace Plate Helm
description: A plate helm primarily issued to soldiers wielding bows, firearms, or raising banners. The wide brim shields the eyes from sun and rain to preserve visibility, while the thin plate protecting the head deflects shrapnel and falling debris. Its open-faced design ensures commands and whistles are heard clearly, with a focus on mobility and observation.

name: Grape Pack
description: A pack containing grapes. Made of sturdy cloth and a wooden frame, it is a practical choice.

name: Great Thief's Gloves
description: Gloves enchanted with perception-altering magic. These ensure the victim doesn't realize something's been stolen, and is the secret to how the legendary master thief never once appeared on a bounty notice.

name: Grey Wolf Cloth Cloak
description: A cloak for freeswords who roam the frontier. Rough cloth and frayed edges blend with the wind, blurring the wearer's silhouette. Its excellence in blocking the chill and staying hidden makes it ideal for tracking and ambushes.

name: Grey Wolf Cloth Gloves
description: Cloth gloves favored by freeswords who roam the frontier. Reinforced with thick hide and cloth to protect the hands, while the patterned wrist strap holds the gloves tight. It is crafted to last hard marches and combat.

name: Grey Wolf Leather Armor
description: Leather armor favored by freeswords who roam the frontier. Layered sheets of rough grey leather help deflect arrows and blades, while the metal pauldrons reinforce vital areas. It doesn't hinder mobility, making it well suited for long trips and ambushes.

name: Grey Wolf Leather Boots
description: Leather boots favored by freeswords who roam the frontier. Layered with multiple sheets of sturdy hide to wrap the ankle and shin, it doesn't easily slip even on muddy roads. A high collar and tightly tied laces secure the foot firmly in place.

name: Grey Wolf Leather Cloak
description: A leather cloak favored by freeswords who roam the frontier. Rough grey leather and a fur collar keep out the cold wind, while the long hem wraps around the body to hold in warmth while moving. Tough against dust and rain, it's well suited to camp life and long trips.

name: Grey Wolf Leather Gloves
description: Leather gloves favored by freeswords who roam the frontier. Stitched from layered, thick leather, they resist cuts and chafing, and brace the wrist so the grip on weapons holds longer without tiring the wearer's hands. They don't wear out easily, even in harsh weather.

name: Grotevant Cloak
description: A cloak from a faraway land beyond the reach of any journey on foot. It is said to have once been a black cloak trimmed with gold. Tales claim its wearer passed through lands brimming with grand adventures before finally reaching Pywel.

name: Grotevant Plate Armor
description: An armor from a faraway land beyond the reach of any journey on foot. It is said to have once been a black armor trimmed with gold. The repainted plates now yearn for new battles and challenges.

name: Grotevant Plate Boots
description: Boots from a faraway land beyond the reach of any journey on foot. It is said to have once been a black armor trimmed with gold. Treading the new land, the endless journey will continue.

name: Grotevant Plate Gloves
description: Gloves from a faraway land beyond the reach of any journey on foot. It is said to have once been a black armor trimmed with gold. Battle-worn yet freshly repainted, these gloves await a new master.

name: Grotevant Plate Helm
description: A helm from a faraway land beyond the reach of any journey on foot. It is said to have once been a black armor trimmed with gold. Even in new colors it remains steadfast protecting its wearer.

name: Guard Visione
description: A visione favored by the Delesyian Guards. Its performance is identical to other models. A mysterious helm that can read memory fragments, allowing the wearer to see a memory from the past.

name: Hartmann Plate Helm
description: A standard plate helm issued to the Goldleaf Merchant Guild's private soldiers. The crown and forehead are reinforced with thin plating to protect against falling debris and fragments during transport, while the wide brim shields the eyes from sun and rain to maintain visibility during long-distance moves. The open-face design allows whistles and commands to be heard clearly, prioritizing mobility and observation for escort missions such as guarding wagons or providing long-range cover.

name: Healer's Pack
description: A pack containing first-aid tools and medicines, ready for use in case of emergency.

name: Health Detection Device
description: A scouting helm integrated with unknown technology. The lenses allow the wearer to see through the target's state. Displays the Health of nearby targets.

name: Helfryn Leather Armor
description: A leather armor set once worn by Gabriel Caliburn, Duke of the Kingdom of Demeniss. Made from very dark brown leather with crimson-trimmed edges, it pairs a refined design with durability.

name: Helfryn Leather Boots
description: Leather shoes once worn by Duke Caliburn of Demeniss. A luxury garment practical even for combat. Following Caliburn's rise to power, they became so popular that even the wealthiest individuals struggled to get their hands on them.

name: Helfryn Leather Cloak
description: A leather cloak once worn by Gabriel Caliburn, Duke of the Kingdom of Demeniss. The outer layer is made of sturdy hide and the inner lining uses soft pelt, providing the wearer warmth and safety.

name: Helfryn Leather Gloves
description: Leather gloves once worn by Gabriel Caliburn, Duke of the Kingdom of Demeniss. It is made from premium leather that's both sturdy and flexible. The seams and finishing are exceptionally refined. A small buckle can be used to adjust the wearer's hand size.

name: Helm of Ignition
description: A masterpiece for adventurers who finds even flint a nuisance. It detects and ignites nearby bonfires.

name: Helm of Knowledge
description: Helm crafted for the in-depth pursuit of knowledge. This tool is designed to decipher knowledge from a distance. When equipped, it allows the wearer to explore unknown knowledge from afar.

name: Helm of Loyal Friendship
description: A helm crafted with great care by a Delesyian artisan of excellent craftsmanship. It's a gift meant to honor enduring friendship with the land of technology, regardless of origin. Only those who have contributed to Delesyia are permitted to possess it.

name: Helms Leather Boots
description: Leather boots crafted by desert marauders. Desert bandits are hostile to each other and often kill one another, as well as being slain by freeswords or guards.

name: Helms Plate Gloves
description: Plate gloves crafted by desert marauders. Desert bandits are hostile to each other and often kill one another, as well as being slain by freeswords or guards.

name: Herald of Six O'Clock
description: A deep blue hat adorned with a golden feather. A true adventurer's essential, this piece rewards the diligent by triggering a special event every morning at 6:00 AM.

name: Herbalist's Pack
description: A pack carefully arranged with various herbs and natural ingredients, giving off a fragrant scent.

name: Hernandian Attire
description: A formal outfit tailored in Hernand, suitable for high-society gatherings. Allows official entry into Hernand Castle.

name: Hernandian Banquet Cloak
description: A fine cloak well-suited for formal occasions. As with any high society, a clear divide exists between the elite and the commoners of Hernand. Even as the people starve from the raids, the nobles continue their endless feasting.

name: Hernandian Banquet Leather Boots
description: Formal leather boots made in Hernand, suitable for high-society gatherings. There is a clear divide between the nobles and commoners. While some starve, the nobles feast.

name: Hernandian Crown
description: A ceremonial crown crafted by the master artisans of Hernand. It is worn during formal occasions and is permitted only to those who have contributed to Hernand.

name: Hernandian Honor Guard Armor
description: Cloth armor crafted by Hernand's artisans for ceremonial use and its design reflects the dignity and authority of the guard. Only those who have contributed to Hernand are permitted to possess it.

name: Hernandian Honor Guard Boots
description: Ceremonial boots crafted by Hernand's artisans and made from lightweight yet durable leather. Only those who have contributed to Hernand are permitted to possess it.

name: Hernandian Honor Guard Cloak
description: A ceremonial cloak crafted by Hernand's artisans. Its design reflects the dignity and authority of the guard. Only those who have contributed to Hernand are permitted to possess it.

name: Hernandian Honor Guard Gloves
description: Ceremonial leather gloves crafted by Hernand's artisans and made from lightweight yet durable leather. Only those who have contributed to Hernand are permitted to possess it.

name: Hernandian Noble's Cloak
description: A cloak crafted with great care by a Hernandian artisan, made using only the finest fabrics. Only those who have contributed to Hernand are permitted to possess it.

name: Hungering Fang Leather Armor
description: A leather armor once worn by Ludvig, leader of the Jackals. Made from fine Pailunese leather, the quality of this gear is unmatched by many others. But, the Jackals have stained the armor with irreparable dishonor.

name: Hungering Fang Leather Boots
description: Leather boots once worn by Ludvig, leader of the Jackals. Made only from tough, durable leather, it endures even long marches with ease. The downside is that it's not easy to put on and take off.

name: Hungering Fang Leather Cloak
description: A leather cloak once worn by Ludvig, leader of the Jackals. Its pelt has been carefully treated to maximize durability and warmth at the cost of the heavy weight.

name: Hungering Fang Leather Gloves
description: Leather gloves once worn by Ludvig, leader of the Jackals. These gloves are designed to protect the wrist and forearm from attacks. A small iron plate is fitted to the left hand to improve defense.

name: Hunter's Meat Pack
description: A pack containing meat from hunted animals, covered with hide to preserve freshness.

name: Hunter's Pack
description: A hide-covered pack, equipped with hunting tools. It contains the skin and meat of hunted animals.

name: Hydro Generator Bag
description: A pack that uses heavy rainfall to generate power. It converts the kinetic energy of rainwater into electricity, storing it until it discharges to electrocute nearby enemies. Due to the generator's compact size, it requires a significant amount of time to recharge before it can be used again.

name: Hyena Helm
description: Helm crafted in the desert. Unlike desert bandits who plunder with malice, hyenas are merely hungry beasts. Perhaps in such a wasteland, beasts are better than men.

name: Icewing Plate Armor
description: A plate armor of Gwen Kraber, captain of the Wolf Trackers. She is Giath's loyal right hand, constantly seeking new prey for him. In some ways, she seems an unlikely fit among the Wolf Trackers. Her true origins are unknown, but her skill is beyond doubt.

name: Icewing Plate Boots
description: Plate boots of Gwen Kraber, captain of the Wolf Trackers. She is Giath's loyal right hand, constantly seeking new prey for him. In some ways, she seems an unlikely fit among wolf trackers. Her true origins are unknown, but her skill is beyond doubt.

name: Icewing Plate Cloak
description: A cloak of Gwen Kraber, captain of the Wolf Trackers. She is Giath's loyal right hand, constantly seeking new prey for him. In some ways, she seems an unlikely fit among the Wolf Trackers. Her true origins are unknown, but her skill is beyond doubt.

name: Icewing Plate Gloves
description: Plate gloves of Gwen Kraber, captain of the Wolf Trackers. She is Giath's loyal right hand, constantly seeking new prey for him. In some ways, she seems an unlikely fit among the Wolf Trackers. Her true origins are unknown, but her skill is beyond doubt.

name: Icewing Plate Helm
description: A plate helm of Gwen Kraber, captain of the Wolf Trackers. She is Giath's loyal right hand, constantly seeking new prey for him. In some ways, she seems an unlikely fit among the Wolf Trackers. Her true origins are unknown, but her skill is beyond doubt.

name: Insulated Gloves
description: Woven from insulated bark without a single metal component, this gear protects the wearer from hazardous sparks and electrical leaks during smithing. Though it appears crude, it possesses high resistance capable of grounding even the most powerful lightning magic.

name: Ironwilled Guardian's Leather Armor
description: Leather armor once worn by Paulus, the guard captain. It is crafted in the traditional style of Pailune, with small iron plates reinforced across the coat for both style and practicality.

name: Ironwilled Guardian's Leather Boots
description: Leather shoes once worn by Paulus, the guard captain. It was crafted in the traditional style of Pailune. After the frame was shaped with flexible leather, sturdy hide was added to increase defense.

name: Ironwilled Guardian's Leather Cloak
description: Leather cloak once worn by Paulus, the guard captain. Crafted in Pailune's traditional style, it is finished with animal fur layered over supple leather for a more formal look. The fur around the neck helps keep the wearer warm even in cold weather.

name: Ironwilled Guardian's Leather Gloves
description: Leather gloves once worn by Paulus, the guard captain. It was crafted in the traditional style of Pailune. The sturdy hide along the forearms help prevent unfortunate events of getting struck on the arms. The hands are made from flexible leather, allowing comfortable grip onto other gear.

name: Isilon Leather Boots
description: Leather boots inspired by the classic work of artisan Isilon. While not an exact replica of the original, they still deliver exceptional comfort.

name: Jackal Cloth Cloak
description: A cloak worn by members of the Lonely Jackals. They never give up on a target once the pursuit has begun.

name: Jackals' Leather Armor
description: Armor that is completely broken and can no longer serve its function. Though it cannot be equipped, it can be sold at a shop or donated to the camp.

name: Jackals' Leather Helm
description: A helm worn by members of the Lonely Jackals. They never give up on a target once the pursuit has begun.

name: Jester Leather Cloak
description: A leather cloak draped over the shoulders with thick white fur. The brown leather falls long down the back, giving off both authority and quiet secrecy.

name: Jester Leather Coat
description: A leather coat with a striking deep-blue pattern, lined with soft fabric for a comfortable fit. The luxurious motifs on its outer surface reflect the refined tastes of nobility.

name: Jester Leather Gloves
description: Leather gloves adorned with claw-shaped tips inspired by a wolf's claws. Short fur trims around the wrists add warmth, while the folds running along the fingers are meticulously crafted. Their firm texture reflects the masterful craftsmanship of the artisan who made them.

name: Jester Leather Mask
description: A unique mask combining the piercing gaze of a wolf with a jester hat. Small ornaments hang from the tips of its long, ear-shaped extensions, swaying gently with each step.

name: Kairos Cloak
description: A cloak whose origins cannot be traced anywhere in Pywel's history. Its form has shifted over a long journey, yet the fighting spirit of the great warrior, its former owner, remains.

name: Kairos Plate Armor
description: An armor whose origins cannot be traced anywhere in Pywel's history. Its form has shifted over a long journey, yet its strength still turns aside even the heaviest blow.

name: Kairos Plate Boots
description: Boots whose origins cannot be traced anywhere in Pywel's history. Their form has shifted over a long journey, yet the adventure of the great warrior, its former owner, continues.

name: Kairos Plate Gloves
description: Gauntlets whose origins cannot be traced anywhere in Pywel's history. Their wear and marks speak of the former owner's seasoned swordsmanship.

name: Kairos Plate Helm
description: A helm whose origins cannot be traced anywhere in Pywel's history. Its form has shifted over a long journey, yet the red that yearns for victory has not faded.

name: Kuku Breeze-Step Boots
description: An enhanced kuku pot fashioned into boots. Utilizing the Core of Faith, it momentarily creates gravity-defying platforms beneath the wearer's feet. This allows for leaps to seemingly impossible heights, appearing to others as if you are stepping on thin air. It enables an even higher ascent when performing a Double Jump.

name: Kuku Enhanced Disruptor
description: A disruptor reinforced with a kuku pack. By channeling Abyss energy through a kuku pot, it maintains a stable and sustained output. When activated, it emits powerful electromagnetic pulses that shock nearby machines, causing malfunctions and inflicting heavy damage.

name: Kuku Flame-Resistant Armor
description: Flame plate armor reinforced with an enhanced kuku pot. The Core of Absolution fused within the armor grants superior heat resistance, preventing it from melting even under the most intense fire attacks. Instead, it absorbs the heat to build power, unleashing it back as a searing fire explosion.

name: Kuku Gardening Pack
description: A specialized gathering tool crafted from a modified kuku pack. It is designed to resonate with the health of nearby plants through the Core of Mortification, refined in the Sanctum of Mortification. The pack emits an invisible, warm energy, causing herbs and flowers to drift naturally into the pot on the wind.

name: Kuku Ice-Resistant Armor
description: Frostcursed plate armor reinforced with an enhanced kuku pot. The Dark King's frigid malice within the armor has been further amplified by the Core of Exaltation. It converts even absolute zero temperatures into power, absorbing cold damage to unleash a sudden burst of condensed frost.

name: Kuku Insect Gatherer's Pack
description: A specialized gathering tool crafted from a modified kuku pack. Its Abyss cell is tuned to emit a frequency that attracts insects, causing them to fly directly into the pot as you wander through the forest. Any captured creatures are preserved in a lively state within the pot.

name: Kuku Lightning-Resistant Armor
description: Lightning plate armor reinforced with an enhanced kuku pot. The Titan's essence within the armor has merged with the Core of Penitence, awakening even greater power. It absorbs energy from enemy lightning attacks; once fully charged, it discharges the stored current to unleash a devastating counterattack.

name: Kuku Marni Laser Helm
description: A Marni laser helm reinforced with an enhanced kuku pot. This piece fuses Marni's mechanical genius with the Core of Oblation. It fires a destructive beam wherever the wearer looks, instantly reducing formidable threats to ashes.

name: Kuku Pack
description: A kuku pot modified to be carried as a pack. It is designed to lure and collect nearby mechanical insects. It can be further customized with various parts and power sources to collect different materials or even transform into a tool with entirely different functions.

name: Kuku Rishi's Boots
description: Rishi's Boots reinforced with an enhanced kuku pot. Much like the floating constructions of the Abyss, the soles of these boots subtly warp gravity. They allow the wearer to glide at high speeds, ignoring friction to dodge attacks and traverse the battlefield with the lightness of the wind.

name: Kuku Rocket Pack
description: A specialized flight tool crafted from a modified kuku pack. It glides through the air using propulsion from nozzles connected to the pack, powered by burning fuel stored in an iron pot. However, due to its heavy recoil and a design tailored specifically for orcs, it would likely be difficult for any of the Greymanes to use, except for Oongka.

name: Kuku Transmission 999K Pack
description: A communication device created by modifying a kuku pack. Although its operating principles are not yet fully understood, it utilizes the Core of Expiation to project merchants from different locations or eras, enabling the physical exchange of objects. The power of the Abyss facilitates miracles that transcend the very boundaries of time and space.

name: Kuku Watcher Pack
description: A specialized tactical tool crafted from a modified kuku pack. It deploys two miniature Watchers to provide combat support. Once active, they scout the perimeter and open fire without mercy on any enemies they discover to protect their master.

name: Labrak Cloth Cap
description: A wide-brimmed cloth hat designed to shield against rain and wind. While it protects the wearer from moisture and dust, its defensive capabilities are minimal.

name: Lascaux Leather Boots
description: Leather boots crafted from flexible dark brown leather. The naturally wrinkled ankle area enhances mobility. A blend of practicality and classic design makes them highly sought after.

name: Lauques Cloth Armor
description: A cloth armor named after Lauques, the herald of Demeniss. According to legend, after being denied entry to a foreign royal castle because he forgot the attire that proved his status, he scaled the walls to infiltrate and deliver his letter.

name: Lauques Cloth Cloak
description: A cloth cloak named after Lauques, the herald of Demeniss. Legend says that when a storm delayed his ship, he swam across the sea to deliver an item in time.

name: Lauques Leather Boots
description: Leather shoes named after Lauques, the herald of Demeniss. He is said to have retired and is now enjoying a quiet life.

name: Lauques Plate Helm
description: A plate helm named after Lauques, the herald of Demeniss. Legend says Lauques lost his horse to bandits but delivered his message by clinging on beneath a wagon travelling to Hernand.

name: Leather Armor of Earth's Honor
description: Leather armor popular among Demenissian adventurers. Made from durable yet lightweight fine leather, it is ideal for long-distance travel.

name: Leather Armor of the Fallen Kingdom

materials.name: Leather Armor of the Fallen Kingdom
Leather Armor of the Fallen Kingdom (+1)
Leather Armor of the Fallen Kingdom (+2)
Leather Armor of the Fallen Kingdom (+3)

description: A leather armor once worn by Saigord the Staglord, king of a forgotten kingdom. The kingdom was once prosperous, but its name was buried and lost to history. Now, no one recognizes the armor that once stood as the kingdom's symbol.

name: Leather Boots of Earth's Honor
description: Leather boots popular among Demenissian adventurers. Made from durable yet lightweight fine leather, it is ideal for long-distance travel.

name: Leather Cloak of Earth's Honor
description: Leather cloak popular among Demenissian adventurers. Made from durable yet lightweight fine leather, it is ideal for long-distance travel.

name: Leather Cloak of the Fallen Kingdom

materials.name: Leather Cloak of the Fallen Kingdom
Leather Cloak of the Fallen Kingdom (+1)
Leather Cloak of the Fallen Kingdom (+2)
Leather Cloak of the Fallen Kingdom (+3)

description: A leather cloak once worn by Saigord the Staglord, king of a forgotten kingdom. Icemoor has fallen into ruin, but the great stag still stands as a symbol of strength and duty.

name: Leather Gloves of Earth's Honor
description: The most popular leather gloves among freeswords and adventurers who visit Demeniss. They cover only up to the back of the hand, leaving the fingers free to move, and have recently become popular with merchants as well.

name: Leather Hat of Enlightenment
description: A leather hat resembling an ancient temple's tower. Its clean, unadorned design reflects discipline, mental focus, and a serene inner state.

name: Leather Helm of the Fallen Kingdom

materials.name: Leather Helm of the Fallen Kingdom
Leather Helm of the Fallen Kingdom (+1)
Leather Helm of the Fallen Kingdom (+2)
Leather Helm of the Fallen Kingdom (+3)

description: A helm used by the last prince of the fallen kingdom. The prince waited for the return of the people until the very end. He was called the Staglord, but there were none remaining to recognize him as king.

name: Leather Riding Hat
description: An elegant leather hat favored by nobles, crafted in the form of a wide-brimmed hat that shields the wearer from the sun. A single long, pristine white feather graces one side, adding a touch of refined sophistication.

name: Leddic Cloth Armor
description: Cloth armor worn by the Tommaso guards made from red cloth reminiscent of the desert's crimson sands. The metal plate attached to the chest effectively protects the wearer.

name: Light of the Battlefield Cloth Cloak

materials.name: Light of the Battlefield Cloth Cloak
Light of the Battlefield Cloth Cloak (+1)
Light of the Battlefield Cloth Cloak (+2)
Light of the Battlefield Cloth Cloak (+3)

description: A cloak carrying the hopes for glorious victory. The pure white cloth that is finished with golden trim and patterns lens it a regal air. The adornments on the shoulder resemble wings of light, making the wearer look like a symbol of victory.

name: Light of the Battlefield Plate Armor

materials.name: Light of the Battlefield Plate Armor
Light of the Battlefield Plate Armor (+1)
Light of the Battlefield Plate Armor (+2)
Light of the Battlefield Plate Armor (+3)

description: A plate armor carrying the hopes for glorious victory. Polished golden plates run along the arms, their engraved patterns flashing as they catch the light. The eagles on the pauldrons rise like wings, making the wearer look like a symbol of victory.

name: Light of the Battlefield Plate Boots

materials.name: Light of the Battlefield Plate Boots
Light of the Battlefield Plate Boots (+1)
Light of the Battlefield Plate Boots (+2)
Light of the Battlefield Plate Boots (+3)

description: Plate boots carrying the hopes for glorious victory. Golden plates extend along the legs, while the eagle wings on the knees exude majesty. Leather straps connecting the plates stay snug during movement, reducing noise and instability even when sprinting or making sudden turns.

name: Light of the Battlefield Plate Gloves

materials.name: Light of the Battlefield Plate Gloves
Light of the Battlefield Plate Gloves (+1)
Light of the Battlefield Plate Gloves (+2)
Light of the Battlefield Plate Gloves (+3)

description: Plate gloves carrying the hopes for glorious victory. Polished golden plates flow seamlessly along the arm, while red cords tighten the gaps to ensure a steady fit. The pattern on the wrist flashes in the light, adding a commanding presence that stands out even on the battlefield.

name: Light of the Battlefield Plate Helm

materials.name: Light of the Battlefield Plate Helm
Light of the Battlefield Plate Helm (+1)
Light of the Battlefield Plate Helm (+2)
Light of the Battlefield Plate Helm (+3)

description: A plate helm carrying the hopes for glorious victory. Shaped like a laurel wreath woven from golden leaves, it serves as a clear symbol of victory. Donning this helm instantly elevates the prestige of any warrior on the battlefield.

name: Lightning Bolt Plate Armor
description: A plate armor crafted in the likeness of a massive Titan's chest. Thick metal plates, layered like fortress walls, are held together by rugged leather straps. Faint currents of lightning pulse through the gaps in sync with the wearer's breath, while a low resonance that vibrates the air completes the wearer's sense of intimidation. Increases the wearer's Lightning Resistance.

name: Lightning Bolt Plate Boots
description: Plate boots crafted in the likeness of the massive boots of Titan. Thick plates covering the instep and shins are secured firmly with chains and leather straps. The patterns engraved on the metal surface vibrate faintly, sending a low tremor through the ground with every step.

name: Lightning Bolt Plate Gloves
description: Plate gloves crafted in the likeness of the massive gloves of Titan. Square overlapping plates wrap around the forearms, tightened firmly with leather straps to disperse impact and minimize wrist movement.
