The fingers are exposed for a better grip on weapons, while a faint blue light leaks through the gaps in the plating.

name: Lightning Bolt Plate Helm
description: A plate headgear crafted in the likeness of the massive gloves of Titan. A high crown rises above the grey plating as rough as a rock, with layered rims that resemble the roof and pillars of a small temple.

name: Lizard Leather Cloak
description: A leather cloak commonly used by the Goldenscale Bandits. Its rough scales help deflect blades and don't soak easily in rain. The dark color is ideal for staying hidden, making it well-suited to night raids and escapes.

name: Lizard Leather Helm
description: A leather helm commonly used by the Goldenscale Bandits. Shaped like a massive iguana, it gives off an intimidating presence. Tradition says that the wearer forges this helm from the leather of an iguana they once raised after its death.

name: Low-heeled Leather Boots
description: Low-heeled leather shoes with a low ankle cut, reducing fatigue. On rainy or snowy days, water can seep in and make them uncomfortable.

name: Marni Laser Helm
description: An experimental plate helm designed by the genius Marni. The golden wings on either side accumulate energy to fire a destructive beam forward. However, due to its exceptionally long recharge time, it must be used sparingly for a decisive moment. Can use a beam attack.

name: Mask
description: A simple face covering to conceal your identity and inspire terror in onlookers. It provides the anonymity you need to commit violent acts against any civilian you encounter.

name: Master Du's Circlet
description: A special circlet received from Master Du. It contains the inner power he accumulated through long years of ascetic training. When unleashed, it triggers a series of dazzling bursts of light that incinerate everything ahead.

name: Master Trainer's Touch
description: Gloves once favored by a legendary trainer who spent their entire life with horses. Through the keen senses in the hands holding the reins, one can perfectly understand the horse's intent. A horse that shares a deep bond with its rider quickly absorbs the results of training, growing into a magnificent steed at an incredible pace.

name: Matana Leather Armor
description: A leather armor of the Hernandian Guard. Those working in relatively safe areas often wear leather. Symbols representing Hernand can be found on the armor.

name: Meadows Leather Boots
description: Leather boots made by wandering freeswords with no coins. The craftsmanship is rough and lacking finesse, but it's made from good leather, making it durable and cheap.

name: Melvin Leather Gloves
description: Leather gloves issued to the soldiers of Delesyia. The finest among Delesyia's ranks are not only skilled in combat, but are also expected to master the art of machinery to be deemed truly capable.

name: Military Visione
description: A visione favored by Delesyian guards. Its performance is identical to other models. A mysterious helm that can read memory fragments, allowing the wearer to see a memory from the past.

name: Miner's Lantern Hat
description: A hat favored in secret by veteran miners. The special wavelength emitted by the front lamp makes valuable ores shimmer with a brilliant light.

name: Mistcloaked Owl Leather Armor
description: Armor that is completely broken and can no longer serve its function. Though it cannot be equipped, it can be sold at a shop or donated to the camp.

name: Mistcloaked Owl Plate Helm
description: A helm used by commanders of the Mistcloaked Owls. Its pretentious design perfectly reflects the nature of their organization.

name: Mortain Chain Mail
description: A chain mail issued to the Delesyian soldiers. Rendered in Delesyia's vibrant colors, it gives the impression of festival attire. Only those who have contributed to Delesyia are permitted to possess it.

name: Mortain Plate Helm
description: A plate helm issued to the Delesyian soldiers. This rounded iron helm features a wide brim to shield against sun and rain, designed to deflect downward attacks toward the edges. Its simple single-sheet design makes it lightweight and easy to make, serving as a practical piece of equipment tailored for long marches and field duty.

name: Musket Border Guard Standard Armor
description: Armor worn by the Dusksongs. This equipment was looted when they fled from the Musket military.

name: Musket Border Guard Standard Helm
description: A helm worn by the Dusksongs. This equipment was looted when they fled from the Musket military.

name: Nagmore Leather Boots
description: Leather boots crafted from dark brown leather. The upper part of the boots provides stable protection for the leg, while the folded leather cover on the upper part adds both utility and style.

name: Nibrak Cloth Armor
description: A cloth armor worn by the guards of Kailok, the Hornsplitter. This uniform represents the Goldleaf Merchant Guild that used to run on blood and violence.

name: Northern Fighter's Chain Cloak
description: A chain cloak made to endure the harsh wilds of Calphade. Bitter cold is equally merciless to all. And a true northern warrior overcomes it all and lives to see another day.

name: Northern Fighter's Chain Mail
description: A chain mail made to endure the harsh wilds of Calphade. Only the most resourceful can stave off hunger in the white wasteland. And a true northern warrior overcomes it all and lives to see another day.

name: Northern Fighter's Leather Boots
description: Leather boots made to endure the harsh wilds of Calphade. The wisdom to keep one's bearings in a blizzard is what keeps them sure-footed. And a true northern warrior overcomes it all and lives to see another day.

name: Northern Fighter's Leather Gloves
description: Leather gloves made to endure the harsh wilds of Calphade. Even savage beasts tear into each other just to survive. And a true northern warrior overcomes it all and lives to see another day.

name: Northern Fighter's Plate Helm
description: A plate helm made to endure the harsh wilds of Calphade. Cruel marauders seek the warmth of others' blood to heat themselves. And a true northern warrior overcomes it all and lives to see another day.

name: Oakwood Mushroom Pack
description: A pack containing oakwood mushrooms. Made of sturdy cloth and a wooden frame, it is a practical choice.

name: Odeck's Protector Plate Armor
description: A plate armor once worn by the Forgotten General who guarded Odeck. The steel plates covering the chest and waist overlap like fortress walls, firmly absorbing frontal impacts. A thick rope around the waist keeps the armor secure, providing stability when thrusting a spear.

name: Odeck's Protector Plate Boots
description: Plate boots once worn by the Forgotten General who guarded Odeck. The plate reinforcements covering the shins are layered closely like a ladder, designed to protect the legs even amidst a blizzard. Faint scars from ancient battlefields remain etched upon the silver plate.

name: Odeck's Protector Plate Cloak
description: A plate cloak once worn by the Forgotten General who guarded Odeck. Layered silver pauldrons cover the shoulders, while the deep crimson cloak falls long behind the back, preserving the general's authority. Even after being sealed within the deep valley, it remains remarkably resistant to rust. Standing near it, one can feel the weight of the age-old vow.

name: Odeck's Protector Plate Gloves
description: Plate gloves once worn by the Forgotten General who guarded Odeck. Layered square plates wrap around the forearms, providing steady support when wielding a shield and sword. The faint scratches on the silver surface speak of the years this protector endured.

name: Odeck's Protector Plate Helm
description: A plate helm once worn by the Forgotten General who guarded Odeck. Long red tassels flow from the rounded crown, while an angular visor conceals the wearer's gaze. Layered plates extend down the sides to protect the neckline, and the scratches on its silver surface bear witness to battles fought as an ancient guardian.

name: Official Knight's Cloth Cloak
description: A cloth cloak awarded to knights officially recognized by the kingdom. Its dark fabric hangs neatly, lending an air of dignity. It is crafted to be light yet sturdy, making it suited for both combat and ceremony.

name: Official Knight's Leather Boots
description: Leather boots awarded to knights officially recognized by the kingdom. Made from dark leather drawn up high to wrap the shins, with metal buckles and straps that lock the ankles firmly in place. Its clean silhouette preserves mobility, offering steady comfort even in horseback combat.

name: Official Knight's Leather Gloves
description: Leather gloves awarded to knights officially recognized by the kingdom. Neatly cut from dark leather for a more dignified look, with a wrist strap and metal buckle that lock the gloves firmly in place. The back of the hand and wrist are heavily reinforced, keeping the wearer's grip steady even when holding a weapon for long periods.

name: Official Knight's Plate Armor
description: A plate armor awarded to knights officially recognized by the kingdom. Silver plates are layered over navy fabric featuring ornate patterns, finished with golden trim and rose motifs to reflect the kingdom's formal prestige.

name: Official Knight's Plate Helm
description: A plate helm awarded to knights officially recognized by the kingdom. A pure white plume and golden decorative plates encircle the head, with a central pattern clearly displaying the wearer's allegiance to the kingdom. Made to sit lightly, it provides a dignified appearance without obstructing the wearer's vision.

name: Orange Pack
description: A pack containing oranges. Made of sturdy cloth and a wooden frame, it is a practical choice.

name: Outlaw's Gold Ore Pack
description: A pack filled with illegally mined or plundered ores. It has been crudely reinforced with rough leather and iron chains to support the weight of the heavy ores.

name: Outlaw's Graverobber Pack
description: A pack containing a chaotic assortment of burial goods and relics unearthed from graves. Its contents are hidden beneath old, dust-covered cloth to avoid unwanted attention.

name: Pailunese Attire
description: Traditional attire capturing the unique style of Pailune. People recall when the Greymanes guarded Pailune, hoping their return would let them wear these bright clothes again. Those who have contributed to Pailune are granted the chance to wear it.

name: Pailunese Boots
description: Traditional boots capturing the unique style of Pailune. People recall when the Greymanes guarded Pailune, hoping their return would let them wear these bright clothes again. Those who have contributed to Pailune are granted the chance to wear it.

name: Pailunese Cloak
description: A traditional cloak capturing the unique style of Pailune. People recall when the Greymanes guarded Pailune, hoping their return would let them wear these bright clothes again. Those who have contributed to Pailune are granted the chance to wear it.

name: Pailunese Gloves
description: Traditional gloves capturing the unique style of Pailune. People recall when the Greymanes guarded Pailune, hoping their return would let them wear these bright clothes again. Those who have contributed to Pailune are granted the chance to wear it.

name: Pailunese Hat
description: A traditional hat capturing the unique style of Pailune. People recall when the Greymanes guarded Pailune, hoping their return would let them wear this bright hat again. Those who have contributed to Pailune are granted the chance to wear it.

name: Pale Predator's Leather Gloves
description: Gloves made from the leather of the legendary white crocodile. White, hardened scales wrap the back of the hand to protect against cuts and impacts, and they keep their shape even when soaked.

name: Pavis Leather Boots
description: Mass-produced leather boots commonly used in Demeniss. Sold at an affordable price, they are popular among soldiers as their first piece of personal gear.

name: Pavis Leather Gloves
description: Leather gloves issued to the Demenissian soldiers. Many consider Demeniss the most powerful nation in Pywel, a reputation owed in no small part to its formidable military forces.

name: Peddler's Pack
description: A pack carried by a peddler traveling along the road selling goods. It's surrounded by various boxes and cloth, with miscellaneous items hanging from it. Heavy but functional.

name: Pernicia Plate Gloves
description: Plate gloves favored by the bandits and hunters of the Crimson Desert. Thin iron plates are layered over leather gloves, allowing for fluid movement while easily deflecting incoming blades.

name: Pillager's Leather Boots
description: Unusual boots crafted from leather tailored to the shape of a foot. These shoes have a somewhat grotesque appearance, featuring individual slots for each toe. Landing an attack on an opponent while wearing them increases the chance of making them drop their valuables.

name: Pine Mushroom Pack
description: A pack containing pine mushrooms. Made of sturdy cloth and a wooden frame, it is a practical choice.

name: Pirate King Hat
description: A hat once worn by the man hailed as the Pirate King. Perhaps the secret to his success lies within this very hat. It is imbued with magic that detects nearby treasure chests.

name: Plate Armor of Cursed Soul
description: A plate armor of Fortain the Cursed Knight. To conquer the Wells, he embraced unfathomable power and relinquished his soul. His armor is as splendid as his ambition.

name: Plate Armor of the Shadows
description: A plate armor once worn by Beloth, the Darksworn. The light-consuming, black plate tightly encases the upper body, while unyielding black frost clings to its surface, overwhelming those who face it with chilling dread.

name: Plate Boots of Cursed Soul
description: Plate boots of Fortain the Cursed Knight. To conquer the Wells, he embraced unfathomable power and relinquished his soul. The footsteps of a wraith echo with every step.

name: Plate Boots of the Fallen Kingdom

materials.name: Plate Boots of the Fallen Kingdom
Plate Boots of the Fallen Kingdom (+1)
Plate Boots of the Fallen Kingdom (+2)
Plate Boots of the Fallen Kingdom (+3)

description: Plate boots once worn by Saigord the Staglord, king of a forgotten kingdom. Until his final breath, the Staglord waited for his people who would never return. Now, not a soul remains to acknowledge him as king.

name: Plate Boots of the Shadows
description: Plate boots once worn by Beloth, the Darksworn. The black plates extending to the ankles interlock tightly to eliminate gaps, and the sharp, tapered toes are crafted to crush through ice and snow. Traces of treks through the mountain's blizzards remain, causing a faint trail of black frost to follow whenever the wearer walks upon the snow.

name: Plate Cloak of Cursed Soul
description: A plate cloak of Fortain the Cursed Knight. To conquer the Wells, he embraced unfathomable power and relinquished his soul. This ornate cloak stood as a symbol of his authority.

name: Plate Cloak of the Shadows
description: A cloak once worn by Beloth, the Darksworn. Woven from pitch-black darkness, it protects the wearer from the heat.

name: Plate Gloves of Cursed Soul
description: Plate gloves of Fortain the Cursed Knight. To conquer the Wells, he embraced unfathomable power and relinquished his soul. The gloves hold his desire to seize power and strength.

name: Plate Gloves of the Fallen Kingdom

materials.name: Plate Gloves of the Fallen Kingdom
Plate Gloves of the Fallen Kingdom (+1)
Plate Gloves of the Fallen Kingdom (+2)
Plate Gloves of the Fallen Kingdom (+3)

description: Plate gloves once worn by Saigord the Staglord, king of a forgotten kingdom. Until his final breath, the Staglord waited for his people who would never return. But as the years of waiting dragged on, his gloves lost their former luster.

name: Plate Gloves of the Shadows
description: Plate gloves once worn by Beloth, the Darksworn. Black plating covers the back of the hand, extending down to the knuckles with such precision that the joints interlock like cogwheels when clenching a fist. The wrists are reinforced with thick iron to better parry attacks, while a chilling frost seeps from within the gloves, freezing even the hilts of the weapons they touch white.

name: Plate Helm of Cursed Soul
description: A plate helm of Fortain the Cursed Knight. To conquer the Wells, he embraced unfathomable power and relinquished his soul. He hides his face behind his headgear to desperately turn away from the truth.

name: Plate Helm of the Shadows
description: A plate helm once worn by Beloth, the Darksworn. An iron chain veil hangs beneath a faded crown, concealing the face to project a grotesque sense of intimidation. Every breath exhaled through the links instantly turns to frost, while a black chill lingers behind the veil, capable of freezing even the soul. Can be used to create a zone of ice.

name: Pororin Cloth Attire
description: A cloth attire made by companions from Pororin. You can see their cheerful nature just by looking at the bright colors. The acorn it carries looks like a decoration, but it's said to be a handy meal substitute.

name: Pororin Cloth Cloak
description: A cloth cloak made by companions from Pororin. It is made of bright yellow fabric, adorned with ornate floral decorations. The flowers are specially treated by them so they never wither and always give off a fragrant scent.

name: Pororin Pack
description: A massive pack piled high with all sorts of junk, including herbs and daily essentials. It towers so high that it seems far too burdensome for a small shai to carry. Its contents, precariously secured with rope, shake with every step, making anyone watching feel uneasy.

name: Pororin Petal Hat
description: A hat made in Pororin, featuring beautiful floral decorations that symbolize harmony with nature. When worn, it allows the wearer to commune deeply with the breath of the forest, sensing the location of herbs and fruit carried in the wind.

name: Prototype Visione
description: The very first visione ever created. Its performance is identical to other models. A mysterious helm that can read memory fragments, allowing the wearer to see a memory from the past.

name: Purple Scout Armor
description: Armor for scouts who gather news from across Pywel faster than anyone. A small token of support for their endless journey, made to guard those setting out on great adventures.

name: Purple Scout Cloak
description: A cloak for scouts who gather news from across Pywel faster than anyone. A small token of support for their endless journey, meant to flutter behind those who lead the way.

name: Purple Scout Hat
description: A headgear for scouts who gather news from across Pywel faster than anyone. Designed to accentuate their features, this piece carries a heartfelt wish for their endless journey.

name: Quarrier's Pack
description: A pack containing the tools and equipment required for quarry work, including everything needed to break stone.

name: Rabbit Cloth Boots
description: Thin shoes made from neatly dehaired hide and cloth. The toes are rounded in a soft curve like a rabbit's paw, and they fit snugly to the shape of the foot when worn.

name: Rabbit Leather Coat
description: A leather coat draped in warm brown fur over soft white fabric. The fur trim is plush and smooth. Intricate, beautiful patterns are embroidered across the front.

name: Rabbit Leather Mask
description: A rabbit head mask covered in pure white fur. Its long ears sway softly in the wind, and its round eyes gleam with a mischievous light.

name: Raccoon Cloth Hat
description: Fortunate or not, it feels like it is made of cloth rather than hide. No raccoon was harmed in the making of this hat.

name: Radein Cloth Cap
description: A lightweight, breathable cloth hat with a brim. It keeps out rain and dust but offers minimal protection.

name: Radiant Plate Boots
description: Plate boots popular among women for their clean and neat design. The subtle sheen of the polished iron harmonizes with the golden trim, lending them a luxurious appearance. Primarily sought after by female freeswords, their high demand makes them quite expensive.

name: Reindeer Cloak
description: A cloak made from reindeer. While heavy and cumbersome due to the scent-heavy leather, it makes the wearer look exactly like a deer.

name: Reins of Open Sky
description: Special gloves designed to maximize friction on the palms. They are essential for rock climbing and serve as a lifeline when clinging to thrashing flying creatures. When worn with pairing boots that enhance grip, they allow the wearer to maintain a perfect stance, unbothered by even the most violent shake.

name: Rhonda Leather Boots
description: Leather boots crafted from sturdy dark brown leather. Intricately woven leather lace accents on the sides add both practicality and style.

name: Riding Attire
description: Practical riding gear worn by professional equestrians. It is crafted from soft materials that offer excellent mobility and minimize physical strain even during intense riding. Increases horse taming speed when equipped.

name: Riding Boots
description: Boots worn by nobles during equestrian competitions. Each piece of armor with a similar effect increases the growth rate of the horse.

name: Riding Cloak
description: A cloak worn by nobles during equestrian competitions. Each piece of armor with a similar effect increases the growth rate of the horse.

name: Rivellon Cloth Cap
description: A cloth cap that covers the ears and temples. It provides some protection against wind and dust.

name: Rueconec Cloth Cap
description: A cloth cap that covers the ears and temples. It provides some protection against wind and dust.

name: Ruschar Leather Armor
description: A leather armor popular among freeswords. Despite its affordable price, the material and performance are excellent, making it a favorite among many newly recruited freeswords. It doesn't cover the entire body, but it reliably protects vital areas.

name: Sahazhad Plate Armor
description: An armor crafted in the traditional Varnian style. The warriors of Varnia live with pride as guardians of the sacred city, guiding pilgrims who visit their home onto the righteous path. One can feel their strong conviction from this gear. Only those who have contributed to Tashkalp are permitted to possess it.

name: Sahazhad Plate Boots
description: Plate boots crafted in the traditional Varnian style. The warriors of Varnia live with pride as guardians of the sacred city, guiding pilgrims who visit their home onto the righteous path. These boots represents their strength, which overcomes the burning sand of the desert.

name: Sahazhad Plate Cloak
description: A cloak crafted in the traditional Varnian style. The warriors of Varnia live with pride as guardians of the sacred city, guiding pilgrims who visit their home onto the righteous path. Their cloak represents their respect for the desert god. Only those who have contributed to Tashkalp are permitted to possess it.

name: Sahazhad Plate Helm
description: A helm crafted in the traditional Varnian style. The warriors of Varnia live with pride as guardians of the sacred city, guiding pilgrims who visit their home onto the righteous path. Their helm represents their courage and will to never flee from a battle. Only those who have contributed to Tashkalp are permitted to possess it.

name: Sandwatcher Watcher Pack
description: A special pack designed for transporting delicate machinery through the harsh desert environment. It features a dustproof cover to block out the sand wind and a sturdy metal frame.

name: Scarecrow Cloak
description: A cloak shaped after a scarecrow found in the fields. Made from coarse fabric, it isn't particularly comfortable to wear. Equipping it makes it harder for enemies to detect the wearer while standing still.

name: Scarlet Blades Cloth Armor
description: Clothing issued to the Bleed Bandits. It is said they use the color red so that blood splatters remain inconspicuous.

name: Scarlet Blades Gas Mask
description: A specialized breathing apparatus used by the Bleed Bandits' drug manufacturers. It is said they use the color red so that blood splatters remain inconspicuous.

name: Scholastone Boots
description: Boots issued to the students of Scholastone. This modest garment serves as a reminder for students to devote themselves entirely to their research and studies. Even an outsider may be granted the chance to wear it, provided they have contributed to Scholastone.

name: Scholastone Cap
description: A hat issued to the Scholars of Scholastone. This modest attire symbolizes a scholar's total devotion to research and academic pursuits. Even outsiders may be granted the privilege of wearing it, provided they have made significant contributions to Scholastone.

name: Scholastone Cloak
description: A cloak issued to the scholars of Scholastone. This modest garment symbolizes a scholar's total devotion to research and academic pursuits. Even outsiders may earn the right to wear it by contributing to Scholastone.

name: Scholastone Uniform
description: Uniform for the scholars of Scholastone. These scholars are deeply immersed in studying the unknown. The university welcomes the pursuit of pure knowledge without limit, leaving the boundaries of their research solely to the scholar's own conscience.

name: Schtump Cloth Armor
description: A cloth armor worn by the members of Calphade.  It's made of dark orange cloth material, reinforced with a metal breastplate on the chest to enhance defense. Safer than regular cloth armor, it allows its wearer to calmly aim at enemies.

name: Schtump Cloth Cloak
description: A cloth cloak worn by the members of Calphade. Made from deep crimson fabric, it features a shield-shaped plate with the emblem of Solumena on the left shoulder, indicating it is also worn in combat.

name: Schtump Plate Helm
description: A plate helm worn by the Calphadean Defenders. The rounded crown and short brim covering the forehead deflect rain and attacks, while the vertical bars across the face protect against swords and arrows.

name: Scorchflame Leather Boots
description: Leather boots once worn by Tristan, the Flame Knight. Forged in dragon flame, the boots still hold their heat. Crafting equipment this way is said to be the secret method of the Flame Knights.

name: Scorchflame Plate Armor
description: A plate armor once worn by Tristan, the Flame Knight. This sturdy breastplate, seemingly layered with dragon scales, was forged using the Order's secret Dragon's Flame. Though the surface is scorched, a faint, unyielding warmth still lingers within. Increases the wearer's Fire Resistance.

name: Scorchflame Plate Cloak
description: A plate cloak once worn by Tristan, the Flame Knight. The shoulder guards, crafted in the likeness of a dragon's head and wings, are designed to deflect enemy strikes. Its scorched and tattered hem bears the memory of fierce battles, and a lingering heat still emanates from deep within the equipment.

name: Scorchflame Plate Gloves
description: Plate gloves once worn by Tristan, the Flame Knight. The sharp seams, crafted to mimic dragon claws, and the densely set metal studs are designed to parry enemy blades and provide a tight grip on one's weapon. Though blackened by countless battles, a lingering, ownerless warmth still dwells within the gloves.

name: Scorchflame Plate Helm
description: A plate helm once worn by Tristan, the Flame Knight. Crafted in the likeness of a roaring dragon, it strikes fear into any who behold it. A subtle heat can still be felt when held close.

name: Scrap Metal Pack
description: A pack containing scrap metal and components, with everything needed for repair or recycling.

name: Sein Leather Boots
description: Leather boots crafted from light tan leather. Intricate leather stitching runs along the sides, displaying durability and the artisan's skill. The thick sole helps you move quickly even across rough regions.

name: Shadowleaf Boots
description: Leather boots crafted from layered bark to cover the legs. When removed, they blend so seamlessly with the environment that they are easily mistaken for natural wood.

name: Shadowleaf Cloak
description: This cloak is crafted by weaving leaves and branches into a tough net. When hiding in the brush, it becomes nearly impossible to spot with the naked eye.

name: Shadowleaf Gloves
description: Wooden gloves crafted by weaving bark together with leather straps. The raw, natural texture is preserved to provide maximum camouflage.

name: Shadowleaf Helm
description: A wooden mask woven from pinecones and leaves. It is ideal for blending seamlessly into the wildlife.

name: Shadowleaf Outfit
description: Armor woven from layers of tree bark, perfectly mimicking the rugged texture of the forest.

name: Shoddy Rishi's Boots
description: Crude boots seemingly made by lashing leather and iron plates together with twine. Perform consecutive evades during combat to dash.

name: Silver Fang Helm
description: A helm crafted from the ominous hide of the Silver Fang. The coarse, uncleaned fur retains the raw, distinct scent of the wolf.

name: Silverwolf Leather Armor
description: Modified ashen wolf's leather armor. Made from thick, tough hide, it offers solid protection, but it's so heavy that few people seek it out.

name: Silverwolf Leather Boots
description: Modified ashen wolf's leather armor. Made from thick, tough leather for long-lasting use, but its weight puts a lot of strain on the ankles.

name: Silverwolf Leather Gloves
description: Modified ashen wolf's leather armor. To reduce weight, only a small amount of thick, tough leather was used, then finished by wrapping them in cloth.

name: Skyblazer Cloth Armor
description: Cloth armor once worn by Balthazar, the Wyvernflame. Crafted from a special fabric brought from across the sea, it is resilient enough to withstand even a wyvern's talons. The red knot is steeped in a scent that allows wyverns to identify their handler.

name: Skyblazer Cloth Cloak
description: A cloth cloak once worn by Balthazar, the Wyvernflame. Its front is tailored to hang low, shielding the chest against a wyvern's sudden thrashing. The number of studs on the clasp denotes the wearer's rank; only the commander is entitled to bear five.

name: Skyblazer Cloth Helm
description: A cloth helm once worn by Balthazar, the Wyvernflame. The long metal crest is designed to catch the light, drawing the attention of wyverns lured by the glint of metal.

name: Skyblazer Leather Gloves
description: Leather gloves worn by Balthazar, the Wyvernflame. The blood-red leather across the knuckles glints with a vivid hue amidst the dancing flames. They are tempered to withstand both searing heat and the concussive force of a blast.

name: Solas Plate Armor
description: A plate armor crafted by the orcs of Gorthak. It was forged using premium iron produced at the Krall Foundry. By processing large iron plates directly, it was made without seams to endure heavy impacts.

name: Solas Plate Boots
description: Plate boots crafted by the orcs of Gorthak. Designed with wide plates covering the instep and simple buckles, this equipment can be donned quickly. It maintains its shape even after long treks through rugged regions.

name: Solas Plate Cloak
description: A plate cloak crafted by the orcs of Gorthak. Chains and pauldrons are added to the golden fabric to protect the shoulders. Helfryn, a Demenissian artisan, helped finish it with ornate decorations.

name: Solas Plate Gloves
description: Plate gloves crafted by the orcs of Gorthak. The thick forearm guards feature grooves to prevent ropes from slipping, and the design ensures smooth wrist movement.

name: Solas Plate Helm
description: A plate helm crafted by the orcs of Gorthak. It features a striking, elongated head piece. It protects the entire face except for the eyes, while a gorget and chain mail wrap around the neck to keep out both sand and blades.

name: Soldier's Pack
description: A pack holding the equipment and provisions required for combat. Some armor pieces are strapped to the outside, making it battle-ready.

name: Sonic Resonator
description: A pack adorned with a statue of a monkey clashing cymbals. Once activated, the device emits a deafening roar that draws the attention of everyone nearby. Caution: Rage incited by the resonator's noise may not be limited to enemies.

name: St. Halssius Priest Attire
description: Attire worn by a priest of St. Halssius's House of Healing. It would be best not to concern yourself with the original owner of this gear.

name: St. Halssius Priest's Cloak
description: A cloak worn by a priest of St. Halssius's House of Healing. It would be best not to concern yourself with the original owner of this gear.

name: St. Halssius Priest's Hat
description: A hat worn by a priest of St. Halssius's House of Healing. It would be best not to concern yourself with the original owner of this gear.

name: St. Halssius Priest's Leather Footwear
description: Leather footwear worn by a priest of St. Halssius's House of Healing. It would be best not to concern yourself with the original owner of this gear.

name: Stirrups of the Open Sky
description: Special boots designed with maximum friction on the soles. These are essential for rock climbing and serve as a lifeline when clinging to thrashing flying creatures. When worn with pairing gloves that enhance grip, they allow the wearer to maintain a perfect stance, unbothered by even the most violent shake.

name: Straw Bale Helm
description: A helm made by bundling straw for use as a disguise. It's far too flimsy to really be called a helm, but if you crouch down in a rice paddy or reed bed, the disguise will prove effective.

name: Strongbow Gloves
description: The knuckles are reinforced with special leather, allowing the bowstring to be drawn to its absolute limit. Arrows fired with such high tension absorb the impact upon hit, ricocheting to nearby enemies to inflict a series of wounds.

name: Student's Pack
description: A pack containing books and tools necessary for research which evokes an academic atmosphere.

name: Sungrove Standard Plate Armor
description: A standard plate armor issued to the private soldiers of the Marshell Estate. Its neatly tailored appearance reflects their strict discipline.

name: Sungrove Standard Plate Helm
description: A standard plate helm issued to the private soldiers of the Marshell Estate. Its neatly tailored appearance reflects their strict discipline.

name: Sunset Reed Cloth Boots
description: Cloth boots once worn by the Reed Devil. They carry the grudges of the devil of the reed field and his followers, who slipped free of the cycle of life and death. It tightly fastens around the feet to allow quick movements even through dense reed beds.

name: Sunset Reed Cloth Gloves
description: Cloth gloves once worn by the Reed Devil. They carry the grudges of the devil of the reed field and his followers, who slipped free of the cycle of life and death. Thick layers of tightly compressed cloth give them durability to rival steel.

name: Sunset Reed Leather Armor
description: Leather armor once worn by the Reed Devil. It carries the grudges of the devil of the reed field and his followers, who slipped free of the cycle of life and death. Layers of leather were stitched together, with extra leather reinforced along the seams for added durability.

name: Sunset Reed Leather Cloak
description: A leather cloak once worn by the Reed Devil. It carries the grudges of the devil of the reed field and his followers, who slipped free of the cycle of life and death. Its two savagely twisted horns and the eye holes cut into the mask have become a symbol of terror.

name: Tanner's Pack
description: A pack made of fine hide, with various tools for leatherworking neatly organized inside.

name: Tariv Cloth Attire
description: An attire made by the sorcerers of Tariv. The Black Witch craved the forbidden knowledge held within Tariv. The courage of those who stood against the incarnation of evil is the true magic of Tariv.

name: Tariv Cloth Boots
description: Boots made by the sorcerers of Tariv. People come to Tariv for their own reasons. Once, even the Black Witch approached Tariv, hungering for forbidden knowledge.

name: Tariv Cloth Cloak
description: A cloak made by the sorcerers of Tariv. Tariv is home to sorcerers with mystical powers. They study to understand and safely use their own and each other's abilities.

name: Tariv Cloth Gloves
description: Gloves made by the sorcerers of Tariv. Tariv permits purely academic study of darkness, but some sorcerers have been tempted and slipped into forbidden domains.

name: Tech Gloves
description: It appears to be an ordinary piece of self-defense equipment, but a complex clockwork mechanism is hidden within. Even without a key, small mechanical arms can spring from the gaps in the metal plates, skillfully manipulating the pins of the lock to open the door.

name: Tech Hat
description: An eccentric invention concealing a sophisticated mechanism behind an elegant feather ornament. A special event can be triggered by turning the dial on the front.

name: Technician's Pack
description: A pack meticulously organized with various tools and equipment, containing everything needed for repair or crafting.

name: Tesslit Leather Boots
description: Demenissian leather boots made from sturdy leather. They are practical, making them widely used. It breaks the stereotype that anything made in Demeniss must be unnecessarily flashy and expensive.

name: The Faceless's Cloth Armor
description: Armor worn by members of the Faceless. The dizzying array of impractical, multicolored decorations serves as a testament to their fanatical beliefs.

name: The Faceless's Plate Helm
description: A helm worn by members of the Faceless. The dizzying array of impractical, multicolored decorations serves as a testament to their fanatical beliefs.

name: The Masked Liberator's Cloth Armor
description: Cloth armor once worn by the Masked Liberator. Gold-thread patterns on red cloth and a blue sash hide blood and ash, disguising plunder as justice.

name: The Masked Liberator's Cloth Cloak
description: A cloth cloak once worn by the Masked Liberator. From behind, it looks like a saint's cloak, hiding its true face until it draws near. But only dread awaits those who discover the darkness it conceals.

name: The Masked Liberator's Leather Boots
description: Leather boots once worn by the Masked Liberator. The black leather straps are etched with fine patterns. Extra leather has been reinforced across the instep and sides for greater durability. Their wide, sturdy sole helps the wearer with steady steps even across rough regions.

name: The Masked Liberator's Leather Gloves
description: Leather gloves once worn by the Masked Liberator. A red band wraps around thick yellow-brown leather, giving them a strong impression. Teal laces are tied into firm knots, securing the fit while adding a decorative touch.

name: Tidebreaker Boots
description: Boots equipped with an underwater propulsion device developed by Faust. It activates automatically upon entering the water, helping the wearer swim at high speeds.

name: Tiorant Cloth Armor
description: A cloth armor of the Blue Fangs. Made from blue fabric, it is designed to be light for swift movement through Pailune's forests.

name: Tiorant Cloth Cloak
description: A cloth cloak of the Blue Fangs. Made from blue fabric, it is designed to be light and free of cumbersome ornamentation for ease of movement.

name: Troll Peddler's Pack
description: A pack carried by a troll, enormous in size and stuffed with various items.

name: Turtle Pack
description: A turtle-shaped pack with small items neatly organized inside.

name: Unyielding Warrior's Plate Armor
description: A plate armor worn by the finest warriors in Calphade. Stefan Lanford's reputation is well known throughout Hernand and beyond. He leads his battles with a weapon in his hand, commanding at the front himself.

name: Unyielding Warrior's Plate Boots
description: Plate boots worn by the finest warriors in Calphade. Stefan Lanford's reputation is well known throughout Hernand and beyond. His very presence made countless enemies hesitate to invade Calphade.

name: Unyielding Warrior's Plate Cloak
description: Plate cloak worn by the finest warriors in Calphade. Stefan Lanford's reputation is well known throughout Hernand and beyond. He possessed a presence on the battlefield that commanded respect even from his enemies.

name: Unyielding Warrior's Plate Helm
description: Helm worn by the finest warriors of Calphade. Its striking appearance is renowned even in Hernand, and the nobles wish Stefan Lanford would show his face more often. Stefan couldn't care less.

name: Valortread Plate Armor
description: A plate armor for a brave warrior who never retreats in battle. The breastplate patterned with gold and the massive, bladed pauldrons possess an impressive presence. Scars etched across the armor bear witness to the fierce combats of the past.

name: Valortread Plate Boots
description: Plate boots for a brave warrior who never retreats in battle. Elaborately interlocking golden joint guards wrap thickly around the legs, completing a heavy lower body. The thick plating that seamlessly covers the instep provides an absolute sense of stability, as if one could stand firm upon the rugged earth and withstand any enemy assault.

name: Valortread Plate Cloak
description: A plate cloak for a brave warrior who never retreats in battle. Pauldrons spread like wings around the neck and shoulders, making the wearer appear far more imposing than their true size. The ornate patterns etched onto the crimson cloak command an air of untouchable authority.

name: Valortread Plate Gloves
description: Plate gloves for a brave warrior who never retreats in battle. Brass-colored metal wraps from the fingertips to the elbows, lending destructive power to clenched fists. The flexible finger joints perfectly absorb the shock of swinging heavy weapons, allowing for steady, unwavering attacks.

name: Valortread Plate Helm
description: A plate helm for a brave warrior who never retreats in battle. The layered ridges of the brow are precisely crafted to deflect any blade. The sharply angled visor provides total protection for vital points while maintaining a clear field of vision, allowing the wearer to read the battlefield with unwavering focus.

name: Vaporwalker
description: Boots crafted from waterproof leather with lightweight soles, designed to briefly stay afloat. They allow the wearer to quickly slide across shallow water.

name: Varnian Crown
description: A crown meticulously crafted by the artisans of Varnia. Adorned with gold and jewels, it was traditionally worn during formal ceremonial events. Only those who have greatly contributed to Tashkalp are permitted to possess it.

name: Varnian Noble's Cloak
description: A cloak meticulously crafted by the artisans of Varnia. After it was made, it was blessed three times in Atima's name. Only those who have contributed to Tashkalp are permitted to possess it.

name: Visione
description: A mysterious device that has been gaining popularity in Delesyia. This helm can read memory fragments, allowing the wearer to glimpse at memories from the past.

name: Wanderer of Faith Leather Armor
description: A leather armor that embodies unwavering composure on long journeys. Set on deep-toned leather, gilded trim and layered chains draw striking lines, while the waist belt and knotted accents shape a fitted silhouette. Long panels split at the waist flutter with each movement, leaving a resolute impression with every step.

name: Wanderer of Faith Leather Boots
description: Leather boots that embody unwavering composure on long journeys. Black leather rising to the shin, with tight lacing and a folded cuff for a clean silhouette, while the hard-wearing material stands up to the harsh scrape of dirt tracks and stone paths.

name: Wanderer of Faith Leather Cloak
description: A leather cloak that embodies unwavering composure on long journeys. Deep navy leather, trimmed with gold embroidery and edging, lends it a subtle air of refinement, while its short length over the shoulders keeps the wearer's arms free.

name: Wanderer of Faith Leather Gloves
description: Leather gloves that embody unwavering composure on long journeys. A subtle golden pattern spreads across the dark leather in restrained ornamentation, while the long cut that wraps the back of the hand and wrist helps ward off injury and reduce chafing.

name: Wanderer of Faith's Plate Helm
description: A plate helm that embodies unwavering composure on long journeys. A slender golden band encircles the brow, set with a central jewel that denotes the wearer's status, while the frame is cleverly concealed beneath the hair for a refined, understated look.

name: Watcher Pack
description: A pack worn by the Desert Marauders. A sensitive detection device is installed on the rear, designed to alert the wearer to any presence approaching from the shadows or blind spots.

name: Weaponsmith's Pack
description: A pack organized with various weapons, with a sword and daggers attached outside for easy access.

name: Weasel Leather Armor
description: A leather armor crafted in Calphade. The tradition of making fur-lined armor hails from Pailune. Despite the uneasy history between the two regions, culture doesn't always conform to borders.

name: Weasel Leather Boots
description: Leather boots made in Calphade. The tradition of crafting fur-lined boots comes from Pailune. If it weren't for the Black Bears, Calphade and Pailune might have grown far closer than they are now.

name: Weasel Leather Cloak
description: A leather cloak crafted in Calphade. The tradition of making fur-lined cloaks originates from Pailune. After Jian gained power in Pailune, relations between the two regions steadily improved day by day.

name: Weasel Leather Gloves
description: Leather gloves made in Calphade. The tradition of crafting fur-lined gloves comes from Pailune. Stefan Lanford is said to have been personally close with Jian, and have mourned his death.

name: Wheelwright's Pack
description: A pack containing wheel-related components and tools, with everything needed to repair wagons or carts.

name: White Bear Helm
description: A helm crafted from the hardy hide of the white bear. It is made from roughly tanned leather and fur that still reeks of the beast.

name: White Bloodwind Cloth Cloak
description: A cloth cloak that embodies the bloodbath that sweeps across a cold battlefield. The rough, white fabric flows long, showing more bloodlust the more it whips in the wind.

name: White Bloodwind Leather Armor
description: A leather armor that embodies the bloodbath that sweeps across a cold battlefield. Pure white cloth adornments layered over black leather create a vivid contrast, while metal reinforcements at the shoulders and thighs protect vital points. The white hems flutter with each step, making it stand out even in the midst of combat.

name: White Bloodwind Leather Boots
description: Leather boots that embodies the bloodbath that sweeps across a cold battlefield. Black leather set against pure white trim and a golden buckle, wrapping up to the shin to stop dust and blades alike. It grips the ankle firmly, helping the wearer keep a steady stride even in battle.

name: White Bloodwind Plate Gloves
description: Plate gloves that evoke bloodshed on a snow-swept battlefield. Metal plates layered beneath black leather protect the wrist while adding a refined touch.

name: White Bloodwind Plate Helm
description: A plate helm that embodies the bloodbath that sweeps across a cold battlefield. A black metal band encircles the brow like a circlet, ensuring an unobstructed field of vision. Its rugged surface is adorned with jewels that appear as if frozen solid.

name: White Horn Leather Helm
description: A leather helm crudely fashioned from the skull of a mountain beast to mimic the likeness of White Horn, the mountain spirit.

name: Windmere Standard Plate Armor
description: A standard plate armor issued to the private soldiers of the Byron Estate. Its neatly tailored appearance reflects their strict discipline.

name: Witters Plate Helm
description: A radiant helm discovered deep within a coastal cave. It bears an intimidating design, appearing as if a massive fish is swallowing the wearer's head. Despite being abandoned in damp caves for ages, it remains untarnished by rust, maintaining a brilliant, ethereal luster.

name: Wolf Cloak
description: A cloak crafted from wolf hide. The coarse, uncleaned fur retains the raw scent of the wildlife.

name: Wolf Tracker Cloth Armor
description: Armor worn by the Wolf Trackers. It is noticeably frayed in places, likely from their constant wandering across Pywel in search of prey.

name: Wolf Tracker Cloth Cloak
description: A cloak worn by the Wolf Trackers. It is noticeably frayed in places, likely from their constant wandering across Pywel in search of prey.

name: Wolf Tracker Helm
description: A helm worn by the Wolf Trackers. It is noticeably frayed in places, likely from their constant wandering across Pywel in search of prey.

name: Wolf Tracker Leather Boots
description: Leather boots worn by the Wolf Trackers. All unnecessary ornaments have been removed to maximize mobility.

name: Woodbrock Leather Boots
description: Leather boots made from reddish-brown leather. An extended X-shaped stitching pattern runs along the sides, and the strong seams help maintain their shape during combat and long-distance travel.

name: Woodcutter's Pack
description: A pack containing logging tools and firewood, protected by sturdy hide and cloth.

name: Wooden Mask of Lost Justice
description: A wooden mask once worn by T'rukan the Ascended. No one knows when it was made. Time has left deep traces across its surface, and the red paint around the mouth and eyes completes its chilling expression.

name: Wyvernflame Cloth Helm
description: A cloth helm worn by members of the Wyvernflames. It features a unique design, having been crafted in a distant land.

name: Wyvernflames Captain's Pack
description: A sturdy pack used by Balthazar. Made from special heat resistant leather to withstand a wyvern's flames, it is neatly stocked with scale care tools and training gear, with gunpowder also strapped to it.

name: Wyvernflames Cloth Armor
description: Cloth armor worn by members of the Wyvernflames. It features a unique design, having been crafted in a distant land.

name: Ynitium Leather Armor
description: A leather armor awarded to courageous Pailunese warriors. This light, tough armor symbolizes a bold fighter's spirit and protects vital areas without restricting movement.

name: Ynitium Leather Boots
description: Boots awarded to those recognized for their wisdom as warriors in Pailune, as a reminder to act wisely. With breathability and water resistance, it grants a slight defensive effect.

name: Ynitium Leather Cloak
description: A cloak made of leather bestowed on devoted Pailunese warriors. Though it feels somewhat heavy, it actually offers little real protection.

name: Ynitium Leather Gloves
description: Gloves awarded to those recognized for their leadership as warriors in Pailune, as a reminder to act as a true leader. Well-ventilated for comfort, they offer a modest degree of protection.

name: Yrkabel Cloth Cloak
description: A cloth cloak worn by the followers of Staglord. They claim it is the official uniform of a fallen kingdom from the past, though no historical records of such a nation remain.

name: Yrkabel Leather Armor
description: Leather armor worn by the followers of Staglord. They claim it is the official uniform of a fallen kingdom from the past, though no historical records of such a nation remain.

name: Ziggurat Cloth Helm
description: A helm made from sturdy cloth and thick heating material. It covers the wearer's face, protecting the head from external impacts, harsh winds, and sand.

name: Ziggurat Leather Armor
description: Armor that harmonizes traditional design with practical structure. The long, coat-style leather armor with a hint of blue has a metal ornament attached to the center of the chest, providing stronger protection for the torso.
